startup_summary_v1: Startup agtech que usa IA, data science e IoT para optimizar la produccion de proteina animal y trazar animales a lo largo de la cadena. Entra en tesis por su acople biocentrico y material a sistemas vivos de produccion animal.
business_one_liner: Animal protein optimization and traceability with AI and IoT.
problem_addressed: Ineficiencias productivas y baja trazabilidad en cadenas de proteina animal.
technical_approach: Plataforma con IA, vision computacional, IoT y etiquetas inteligentes para monitoreo y decision.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por operar sobre sistemas vivos y cadenas materiales de proteina animal, no por software horizontal.
evidence_excerpt: The Yield Lab Latam portfolio describes optimization of animal protein production with AI, data science, IoT and smart ear tags for traceability.

startup_summary_v1: Agree is an agri-food chain digitization platform that helps producers, buyers and other counterparties manage quotas, barters, contracts, documents, financing and market positions in one place. Its platform focuses on traceability, sustainability and day-to-day coordination across grains, oilseeds, fruit and vegetable chains. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as agri-food traceability and market infrastructure directly attached to material biological supply chains.
business_one_liner: Agri-food chain traceability and market infrastructure.
problem_addressed: Fragmented commercial workflows, weak traceability and poor coordination across agri-food chains.
technical_approach: B2B platform for quotas, barters, contracts, documents, market positions, financing and traceability/sustainability workflows.
thesis_scope_note: Include as market, traceability and coordination infrastructure for biological supply chains, not as generic fintech/software.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says Agree accelerates digital transformation of agri-food chains, helping users manage quotas, barters, contracts, documents and financing while focusing on traceability and sustainability.

startup_summary_v1: Infraestructura B2B para la compra, venta y logistica de semillas, fertilizantes y agroquimicos entre empresas del agro. Entra en tesis como capa digital fuertemente acoplada a flujos materiales de insumos agricolas.
business_one_liner: B2B ag-input market infrastructure.
problem_addressed: Comercializacion fragmentada e ineficiente de insumos agricolas.
technical_approach: Marketplace digital con inteligencia de mercado y logistica integrada para insumos del agro.
thesis_scope_note: Entra como infraestructura digital directamente conectada a la cadena material de insumos agropecuarios.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes an exclusive business marketplace for agricultural inputs, with logistics and business intelligence for seeds, fertilizers and agrochemicals.

startup_summary_v1: Brazilian rural-finance platform building a digital bank for small and medium poultry, pork and dairy producers. It uses historical production data from integrated animal-protein systems to manage credit risk and finance infrastructure and operational improvements. It remains an edge include because the mechanism is fintech, but the use case is tightly coupled to animal health, welfare, supply-chain resilience and livestock production.
business_one_liner: Animal production financial infrastructure.
problem_addressed: Credit constraints and infrastructure gaps among integrated poultry, pork and dairy producers.
technical_approach: Digital banking, production-data underwriting and credit for infrastructure and operational improvements.
industry_destination: Animal protein supply chains, rural finance and livestock infrastructure
thesis_scope_note: Edge include: financial infrastructure directly coupled to animal production, welfare and supply-chain resilience.
evidence_excerpt: The Yield Lab Latam portfolio describes a digital bank for poultry, pork and dairy producers using historical production data to manage credit risk and finance infrastructure and operational improvements that strengthen supply chains and animal welfare.

startup_summary_v1: Brazilian molecular-screening company developing a quantum-electrochemical chip for real-time drug discovery and affinity testing across molecule sizes, from small organics to complex biologics. Originating from UNESP research, its device aims to make molecular interaction assays faster, more accessible and more sensitive. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as scientific instrumentation for biological binding, drug discovery and pharma R&D.
business_one_liner: Quantum-electrochemical molecular screening for drug discovery.
problem_addressed: Slow, costly and low-access molecular affinity assays in drug discovery.
technical_approach: Quantum-electrochemical chip sensing for real-time molecular interaction and biological binding analysis.
industry_destination: Drug discovery, molecular screening and pharma R&D
thesis_scope_note: Core include: scientific instrumentation directly applied to biological binding and drug discovery.
evidence_excerpt: Qnity describes a quantum-electrochemical device for ultra-sensitive drug discovery and screening across molecule sizes; UNESP says the technology accelerates molecular affinity assays for pharmaceutical development.

startup_summary_v1: Mendoza-based formulation company using AI, chemistry and R&D to design customized antioxidant systems that extend shelf life and reduce oxidation-related waste in food, animal nutrition, pet food and cosmetics. Its work is not core biotech, but it is materially linked to biological products and food-system efficiency. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as ingredient/formulation intelligence for waste reduction and product preservation.
business_one_liner: AI-designed antioxidant systems for shelf-life extension.
problem_addressed: Oxidation, rancidity, short shelf life and waste in food and related biological formulations.
technical_approach: AI search over antioxidant combinations, lab validation and formulation licensing for specific product matrices.
industry_destination: Food, animal nutrition, pet food and cosmetics
thesis_scope_note: Include as a food-system formulation and waste-reduction edge case, not as deep biotech.
evidence_excerpt: LinkedIn describes MIGMA as using AI to discover synergistic antioxidant combinations and design tailored blends for food, animal nutrition and cosmetics.

startup_summary_v1: Ruuts is a regenerative-agriculture platform creating market incentives tied to measurable ecological outcomes such as soil carbon, biodiversity, water-cycle restoration and productive transition for rural producers. It is not food ingredients; it should cluster with nature restoration, carbon intelligence, regenerative land management and ecological outcome measurement.
business_one_liner: Regenerative agriculture incentives and ecological outcome measurement.
problem_addressed: Regenerative land transition lacks trusted incentives and measurable ecological outcomes for producers and markets.
technical_approach: Regenerative land-management programs, ecological outcome measurement and market incentives for producers.
industry_destination: rural producers, land restoration, carbon and biodiversity markets
thesis_scope_note: Include as biocentric land restoration and planetary-boundary infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Ruuts official site describes regenerative land management that captures carbon, restores biodiversity and creates sustainable value for agricultural land.

startup_summary_v1: Empresa estadounidense de semiconductores fabless que desarrolla power amplifiers mas eficientes para comunicaciones wireless. Queda fuera por no ser startup BIO LATAM ni operar sobre sistemas vivos o transicion bio/material.
business_one_liner: Energy-efficient wireless semiconductor hardware.
problem_addressed: Ineficiencia energetica en power amplifiers para comunicaciones wireless.
technical_approach: Hardware semiconductor y dual-drive power amplifier para fabricantes de hardware de telecomunicaciones.
thesis_scope_note: Queda fuera: hardware semiconductor US/telecom, sin senal BIO LATAM suficiente.
evidence_excerpt: TechCrunch describes Falcomm as a US fabless semiconductor company developing energy-efficient power amplifiers for wireless communication markets.

startup_summary_v1: Software enterprise para conectar agentes de IA con datos y sistemas reales de negocio. Queda fuera por ser AI/data infrastructure horizontal sin acople bio/material ni stewardship planetario.
business_one_liner: AI agent connectivity layer for enterprise systems.
problem_addressed: Dificultad para conectar agentes de IA con datos reales de negocio.
technical_approach: Plataforma de datos, MCP y agentes de ultima milla para BI, data engineering y automatizacion empresarial.
thesis_scope_note: Queda afuera: infraestructura digital horizontal para IA empresarial.
evidence_excerpt: LinkedIn describes Teramot as the connectivity layer for AI agents, enabling last-mile agents to access company business data.

startup_summary_v1: Software de aceleracion de IA que busca reducir costos de computo mediante algoritmos numericos. Queda fuera por ser infraestructura AI horizontal sin acople BIO LATAM.
business_one_liner: AI compute acceleration software.
problem_addressed: Alto costo de computo para IA.
technical_approach: Software y algoritmos numericos para acelerar cargas de IA y machine learning.
thesis_scope_note: Queda afuera: software de infraestructura AI sin senal bio-based, biocentrica o de limites planetarios.
evidence_excerpt: F6S describes VMind as an AI acceleration software company that cuts AI compute costs using numerical algorithms.

startup_summary_v1: Agrojusto is an Argentine digital infrastructure platform for small producers, local food systems and territorial value chains. Its tools support traceability, producer digitization, market access and coordination between public agencies, buyers and food producers. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as food-system market infrastructure directly coupled to material agricultural supply chains, not as generic software.
business_one_liner: Traceability and market-access platform for smallholder food systems.
problem_addressed: Small producers and territorial food systems often lack traceability, digital commercial channels and coordinated access to buyers.
technical_approach: Traceability tools, rural digitization, producer onboarding, marketplace infrastructure and food-chain coordination software.
industry_destination: Smallholder agriculture, territorial food systems and food value chains
thesis_scope_note: Include as digital infrastructure tightly coupled to food production, traceability and smallholder market access.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes technology for market access, traceability and territorial implementation with small producers and food systems.

startup_summary_v1: Infraestructura para tokenizar granos y otros activos del agro, habilitando pagos, financiamiento, colateral y trazabilidad sobre activos materiales reales. Entra en tesis por acople fuerte a cadenas agro-materiales y capa de trazabilidad/sustentabilidad.
business_one_liner: Real-world asset and traceability infrastructure for agribusiness.
problem_addressed: Baja liquidez, trazabilidad y eficiencia financiera sobre activos agropecuarios reales.
technical_approach: Tokenizacion blockchain de granos y herramientas de trazabilidad, sostenibilidad y collateral management.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por infraestructura financiera y de trazabilidad anclada en activos materiales y cadenas del agro.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes digitization of grains into agrotokens and additional traceability and sustainability explorer tools for material supply chains.

startup_summary_v1: Startup biobasada que produce astaxantina natural a partir de microalgas para acuicultura, nutraceutica, alimentos funcionales y cosmetica. Entra en tesis por food biotech and novel ingredients.
business_one_liner: Microalgae functional ingredients company.
problem_addressed: Dependencia de ingredientes sinteticos derivados del petroleo y antioxidantes menos saludables.
technical_approach: Cultivo de microalgas en fotobiorreactores para producir astaxantina natural escalable.
industry_destination: Aquaculture, nutraceuticals, functional food and cosmetics
thesis_scope_note: Entra por produccion biobasada de compuestos funcionales con impacto material claro en alimentos y salud.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes scalable natural astaxanthin production from microalgae for aquaculture and human and animal health-related markets.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de therapeutics que desarrolla nanomedicina biomimetica para llevar farmacos directamente al hueso. Entra en tesis por therapeutics and regenerative medicine.
business_one_liner: Bone-targeted drug delivery startup.
problem_addressed: Baja precision en el tratamiento de enfermedades oseas y efectos adversos por distribucion sistemica.
technical_approach: Nanoesferas de hidroxiapatita inspiradas en la remineralizacion osea para transportar y liberar farmacos en hueso.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por plataforma terapeutica biologica con biomateriales y medicina regenerativa.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes hydroxyapatite nanospheres that target bone and improve the delivery of drugs such as bisphosphonates for osteoporosis and other bone diseases.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de biotech industrial que desarrolla enzimas de bajo costo usando hongos filamentosos y subproductos agroindustriales para hacer procesos mas sustentables. Entra en tesis por biomanufacturing and bioindustrial platforms.
business_one_liner: Industrial enzyme company using circular feedstocks.
problem_addressed: Costo alto de enzimas y baja adopcion industrial de catalizadores biologicos en procesos sostenibles.
technical_approach: Ingenieria genetica de hongos y bioprocesos escalables a partir de subproductos de bajo costo.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por biomanufactura y sustitucion de procesos lineales por catalisis biologica.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes low-cost enzyme production using engineered filamentous fungi and agroindustrial byproducts.

startup_summary_v1: Startup biotech que desarrolla una plataforma de alto throughput para sintesis de librerias combinatorias, screening y descubrimiento de aptameros aplicados a drug discovery, diagnostico y biosensores. Entra en tesis por computational biology and scientific software.
business_one_liner: High-throughput discovery and aptamer platform for life sciences.
problem_addressed: Procesos de descubrimiento y validacion biologica lentos, caros y poco paralelizables.
technical_approach: Bioprinting y deposicion de ultra bajo volumen para sintesis in situ, screening miniaturizado y exploracion de aplicaciones en genomica, proteomica, diagnostico y biosensores.
industry_destination: Biotech, pharma, diagnostics and life-science R&D
thesis_scope_note: Entra por infraestructura de I+D biologica fuertemente acoplada a discovery, assays y aplicaciones experimentales en ciencias de la vida.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes high-throughput discovery using ultra-low-volume deposition, combinatorial library synthesis and applications across genomics, proteomics, diagnostics, biosensors and whole-cell assays.

startup_summary_v1: Startup biotech que diseña insecticidas de nueva generacion basados en venenos de aracnidos para proteger cultivos con mayor precision biologica. Entra claramente por ag biologicals and crop resilience.
business_one_liner: Arachnid-venom bioinsecticide platform.
problem_addressed: Dependencia de insecticidas menos especificos y con peor compatibilidad biologica en proteccion de cultivos.
technical_approach: Diseno racional de insecticidas inspirados en venenos de aracnidos y bioactivos dirigidos.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por crop protection biologico y diseno molecular aplicado a sistemas vivos de produccion.
evidence_excerpt: GRIDX portfolio says Arakion develops rationally designed insecticides based on arachnid venom.

startup_summary_v1: Plataforma empresarial de agentes de IA para automatizar flujos de trabajo complejos sobre datos y procesos. Queda afuera por ser software horizontal de enterprise AI sin señal material, bio o regenerativa clara.
business_one_liner: Plataforma enterprise AI para workflows y datos complejos.
problem_addressed: Procesos empresariales fragmentados y tareas intensivas en datos.
technical_approach: Agentes multimodales, model routing y automatizacion de workflows.
thesis_scope_note: Queda afuera por no estar acoplada a sistemas materiales o life-based.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes enterprise AI workflows, extraction, model routing and reasoning over business data.

startup_summary_v1: ArgenTAG is a life-science tools company building high-resolution single-cell long-read sequencing solutions. Its Single-Cell RNA Library Kit uses portable microfluidic cell partitioning, magnetic bead capture and smart barcoding so individual-cell transcriptomes can be sequenced on long-read platforms such as Oxford Nanopore and PacBio. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as genomics infrastructure for biomedical research, diagnostics, disease biology and cell-level discovery.
business_one_liner: Single-cell long-read sequencing kit and workflow.
problem_addressed: Single-cell sequencing remains expensive, fragmented and hard to use for full-length transcript and isoform discovery.
technical_approach: Portable microfluidic partitioning, mRNA capture beads, smart barcoding and long-read-compatible single-cell RNA library preparation.
industry_destination: Biopharma, biomedical research and life-science labs
thesis_scope_note: Include as life-science tooling and genomics infrastructure, not general software.
evidence_excerpt: Official product page describes a Single-Cell RNA Library Kit for long-read sequencing using portable microfluidic chips, magnetic beads and smart barcoding for ONT and PacBio-compatible workflows.

startup_summary_v1: Arqlite is a circular-materials company converting hard-to-recycle plastics into low-carbon lightweight aggregates and other materials for construction and manufacturing. It is not biomanufacturing or molecular biotech; it belongs inside the broader BIO VC LATAM perimeter as planetary-boundary circular materials infrastructure that reduces plastic waste and substitutes virgin construction inputs.
business_one_liner: Circular materials company converting hard-to-recycle plastic into construction aggregates.
problem_addressed: Hard-to-recycle plastics leak into waste streams while construction materials depend on high-impact virgin aggregates.
technical_approach: Waste-plastic transformation into recycled lightweight aggregates and low-carbon construction materials.
thesis_scope_note: Include as circular materials and resource recovery, not biotech.
evidence_excerpt: Public company profiles describe technology that converts hard-to-recycle plastics into low-carbon materials and recycled aggregates for construction and manufacturing.

startup_summary_v1: Plataforma de identidad y acceso para autenticacion y autorizacion en aplicaciones. Queda afuera por ser software horizontal sin señal de materialidad, bio o limites planetarios.
business_one_liner: Software de identidad y acceso para empresas.
problem_addressed: Gestion digital de identidad y autorizacion en software.
technical_approach: Infraestructura IAM, autenticacion y autorizacion.
thesis_scope_note: Queda afuera de tesis por no estar acoplada a sistemas materiales o life-based.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes an authentication and authorization platform for apps and APIs.

startup_summary_v1: Plataforma de gestion de salud corporativa y optimizacion de beneficios para empresas. Queda afuera por no ser health biotech o medtech de tesis, sino software corporativo de beneficios y datos.
business_one_liner: Gestion de salud corporativa y beneficios con analitica.
problem_addressed: Costos y siniestralidad en planes de salud corporativos.
technical_approach: Analitica de salud, beneficios y navegacion clinica para empresas.
thesis_scope_note: Queda afuera por ser health software corporativo, no una startup bio-based o medtech thesis-core.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes corporate health management, claims reduction and benefits optimization.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de biotech terapeutico que desarrolla una inmunoterapia basada en nanoparticulas de RNA para instruir al sistema inmune a atacar celulas cancerosas. Entra en tesis por therapeutics and regenerative medicine.
business_one_liner: Biotech terapeutica basada en RNA nanoparticle immunotherapy.
problem_addressed: Baja respuesta de muchos pacientes a inmunoterapias actuales contra cancer.
technical_approach: Nanoparticulas de RNA no inflamatorias para entrenar al sistema inmune contra cancer.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por plataforma terapeutica biologica clara y thesis-core en salud humana.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes a novel immunotherapy based on RNA nanoparticles targeting cancer.

startup_summary_v1: Cadena de restaurantes saludables apoyada por software propio para operaciones, delivery y pagos. Queda afuera por ser food service tech y marca de consumo, no una startup bio-based, biocentrica o climate-material thesis-core.
business_one_liner: Cadena foodtech con software operativo para restaurantes.
problem_addressed: Ineficiencias operativas y experiencia fragmentada en restaurantes.
technical_approach: Tecnologia para punto de venta, operaciones, delivery y pagos integrada a la cadena.
thesis_scope_note: Queda afuera por no mostrar una tesis fuerte de biofabricacion, regeneracion o materialidad climatica.
evidence_excerpt: Market and company sources describe a healthy-food restaurant chain with proprietary operations technology.

startup_summary_v1: Agrobiotech que desarrolla tecnologias geneticas basadas en fotobiologia para mejorar fotosintesis, productividad y resiliencia de cultivos. Entra en tesis por ag biologicals and crop resilience.
business_one_liner: Crop trait biotech based on plant photobiology.
problem_addressed: Baja productividad y vulnerabilidad climatica de cultivos extensivos.
technical_approach: Ingenieria genetica y fotobiologia para optimizar genes clave de crecimiento y tolerancia al estres.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por plataforma biologica de mejora genetica de cultivos con impacto material directo.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes technologies to improve photosynthesis, yield and drought resilience in crops through advanced photobiology and biotechnology.

startup_summary_v1: Beeflow combines crop science, bee biology, data analytics and proprietary bee-nutrition technologies to provide professional pollination services that improve fruit yield and quality. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a biocentric ag-biologicals company: the product is not software alone, but managed biological pollination performance in specialty-crop production.
business_one_liner: Pollination science and bee-biotechnology company for agriculture.
problem_addressed: Pollination is inconsistent, climate-sensitive and often treated as an unmanaged input in fruit production.
technical_approach: Crop data, bee biology and proprietary nutritional technologies applied through professional pollination services.
thesis_scope_note: Include as direct intervention on living pollination systems and crop resilience.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes a biotechnology company providing professional pollination services using crop data and proprietary bee nutritional technologies.

startup_summary_v1: Plataforma para centralizar compras no estrategicas, proveedores y trazabilidad de compras corporativas. Queda afuera por ser software procurement horizontal sin señal material o bio-based.
business_one_liner: Software de procurement para compras corporativas.
problem_addressed: Friccion operativa en compras estandarizadas y no estrategicas.
technical_approach: Marketplace y software de compras con trazabilidad y aprobaciones.
thesis_scope_note: Queda afuera por no mostrar acople a sistemas materiales, bio o regenerativos.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes centralized procurement, suppliers and traceability for standardized purchases.

startup_summary_v1: Plataforma de beneficios, proteccion y wellness para empleados. Queda afuera por ser software e insurtech horizontal sin señal material o bio-based clara.
business_one_liner: Plataforma de beneficios y proteccion laboral.
problem_addressed: Gestion de beneficios y bienestar corporativo.
technical_approach: Software de beneficios, seguros y personalizacion de cobertura.
thesis_scope_note: Queda afuera por falta de acople a materialidad, bioeconomia o sistemas regenerativos.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes personalized protection and benefits for employees.

startup_summary_v1: Startup food-biotech que desarrolla bio-preservantes gaseosos naturales para controlar hongos y extender la vida util de alimentos sin aditivos quimicos. Entra en tesis por food biotech and novel ingredients.
business_one_liner: Food preservation biotech for clean-label shelf-life extension.
problem_addressed: Perdida de alimentos y contaminacion microbiologica en productos frescos y minimamente procesados.
technical_approach: Bio-preservantes gaseosos naturales para control de microorganismos contaminantes.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por intervencion biologica y material clara sobre desperdicio alimentario y preservacion natural.
evidence_excerpt: Official public export profile describes gas-based natural bio-preservatives that control fungi and extend shelf life without chemical additives.

startup_summary_v1: Startup biotech que usa vesiculas bacterianas para mejorar delivery preciso en salud digestiva. Entra en tesis por therapeutics and regenerative medicine.
business_one_liner: Bacterial vesicles for digestive health delivery.
problem_addressed: Intervenciones poco precisas y menos efectivas en salud digestiva.
technical_approach: Uso de vesiculas bacterianas como sistema de entrega biologico.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por plataforma terapeutica biologica, no por software.
evidence_excerpt: GRIDX portfolio describes bacterial vesicles to transform digestive health through precise and effective delivery.

startup_summary_v1: Biodiversity Intelligence is a nature-measurement and reporting startup that combines environmental DNA and satellite technology to monitor biodiversity and generate decision-grade nature intelligence. Its role is not generic software: it creates auditable data about ecosystems, land stewardship and biodiversity condition for organizations managing productive territories or conservation assets. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as planetary-boundary infrastructure for biodiversity monitoring and nature accountability.
business_one_liner: Nature measurement and biodiversity reporting platform.
problem_addressed: Poor visibility into biodiversity loss and weak measurement of ecosystem condition in productive territories and conservation areas.
technical_approach: Environmental DNA, satellite analytics and biodiversity-monitoring workflows for nature measurement and reporting.
industry_destination: Nature reporting, conservation and land stewardship
thesis_scope_note: Include as nature-measurement infrastructure for biodiversity and planetary-boundary stewardship, not horizontal software.
evidence_excerpt: GRIDX portfolio says Biodiversity Intelligence measures and reports nature with DNA and satellite tech.

startup_summary_v1: Biotech agricola que desarrolla herramientas geneticas y traits editados para mejorar control de malezas y productividad de cultivos. Entra en tesis por ag biologicals and crop resilience.
business_one_liner: Crop trait biotech for resilient agriculture.
problem_addressed: Manejo de malezas costoso e insostenible en agricultura extensiva.
technical_approach: Gene editing y desarrollo de rasgos para tolerancia multiple a herbicidas y sistemas de cultivo mas eficientes.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por biotecnologia aplicada a productividad agricola y reduccion de presion quimica.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes biotech tools for weed control and crop production, including genome-edited crop solutions and partnerships with seed companies.

startup_summary_v1: Empresa de biomateriales que transforma sargazo y otras biomasas marinas en empaques compostables, espumas y peliculas biodegradables. Entra en tesis por circular material systems.
business_one_liner: Seaweed biomaterials and compostable packaging company.
problem_addressed: Dependencia de plasticos de un solo uso y pasivos ambientales generados por el sargazo invasor.
technical_approach: Biorefinery y formulacion de biomateriales a partir de alginatos, celulosa y compuestos del sargazo.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por sustitucion material y regeneracion ecosistemica ligada al aprovechamiento de biomasa invasora.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes compostable packaging and biomaterials made from invasive sargassum and other seaweed-derived compounds.

startup_summary_v1: Chilean plant-biotechnology company developing botanical-origin active ingredients for crop protection and human-health applications. Its platform uses proprietary plant tissue culture to produce consistent raw materials without relying only on field-grown botanical extraction. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a biobased active-ingredient and ag biologicals company, with relevance to crop resilience, natural product supply chains and plant-cell bioprocessing.
business_one_liner: Botanical active ingredients from plant tissue culture.
problem_addressed: Dependence on less sustainable botanical raw materials and crop-protection chemistries.
technical_approach: Proprietary plant tissue culture for consistent botanical raw materials and crop-protection active ingredients.
industry_destination: Agriculture, natural active ingredients and crop protection
thesis_scope_note: Core include: plant biotechnology, botanical active ingredients and crop-resilience applications.
evidence_excerpt: LinkedIn describes Botanical Solutions as a Chilean biotech company using proprietary plant tissue culture technologies to create botanical-origin raw materials for crop protection and human health.

startup_summary_v1: Startup climate-bio que desarrolla bioplasticos de alto desempeño mediante bacterias ingenierizadas, fermentacion de precision y feedstocks baratos o residuales. Entra en tesis por circular material systems.
business_one_liner: Bioplastics production technology company.
problem_addressed: Alto costo y bajo rendimiento de los bioplasticos frente a plasticos fosiles.
technical_approach: Ingenieria de cepas y fermentacion para producir biopolimeros a partir de azucares de bajo costo y residuos agroindustriales.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por plataforma bioindustrial clara para sustituir plasticos fosiles.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes engineered bacteria, precision fermentation and low-cost feedstocks to produce customizable bioplastics at scale.

startup_summary_v1: Plataforma de semantic search y analitica para investigacion en life sciences. Entra en tesis como software cientifico acoplado de forma directa a I+D biologica.
business_one_liner: Semantic search engine for life sciences.
problem_addressed: Busqueda fragmentada e ineficiente de literatura, grants, patentes y entidades biologicas en investigacion.
technical_approach: Motor de busqueda semantico con base de datos en grafo y herramientas analiticas para investigadores en ciencias de la vida.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por software especializado de infraestructura para investigacion biologica, no como software horizontal.
evidence_excerpt: Public profiles describe BioSeek as a specialized search engine and research environment for life sciences with semantic search and analytics.

startup_summary_v1: BioSynaptica is an Argentine biotechnology company developing innovative biopharmaceuticals for neurodegenerative diseases, with public evidence centered on a neuropharmaceutical based on human erythropoietin derivatives. The company belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a therapeutic biotech case: its core is drug development for brain and nervous-system disease, not ag intelligence or generic life-science services.
business_one_liner: Biopharmaceutical platform for neurodegenerative diseases.
problem_addressed: Neurodegenerative diseases lack effective disease-modifying therapies and need new biopharmaceutical mechanisms.
technical_approach: Human erythropoietin derivative research and biopharmaceutical development for neuroprotection.
industry_destination: neurology, CNS therapeutics and pharmaceutical R&D
thesis_scope_note: Include as core therapeutic biotechnology.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says BioSynaptica develops innovative biopharmaceuticals for neurodegenerative diseases and focuses on a neuropharmaceutical based on human erythropoietin derivatives.

startup_summary_v1: Biotalife is a microbiome medtech company developing medical devices that naturally rebalance human microbiota, with an explicit focus on women's health conditions such as vaginal thrush, bacterial vaginosis and dryness. The company belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as microbiome-linked clinical device infrastructure: a health product acting on human microbial ecosystems, not generic wellness or agtech.
business_one_liner: Microbiome medical devices for vaginal health.
problem_addressed: Vaginal microbiota imbalance contributes to recurring health conditions and often lacks gentle, microbiome-preserving treatment options.

thesis_scope_note: Include as microbiome medtech / human health device.

thesis_scope_note: Entra por herramienta medtech concreta, no por software horizontal.

startup_summary_v1: ByBug is a Chilean biotechnology company building an insect-based biomanufacturing platform using genetically modified black soldier fly larvae as living bioreactors. ByBug Synthetics transforms agro-food byproducts into recombinant proteins and bioinputs for pharmaceutical, veterinary, industrial-enzyme and agricultural markets. It is not grain traceability or producer infrastructure; it should cluster with biomanufacturing, recombinant proteins, engineered insects and circular biofactories.
business_one_liner: Engineered insect bioreactors for recombinant proteins and bioinputs.
problem_addressed: Recombinant proteins and bioinputs can be expensive to produce with conventional fermentation and cell-culture infrastructure.
technical_approach: Genetically engineered black soldier fly larvae used as living bioreactors fed with agro-food byproducts.
industry_destination: pharmaceuticals, veterinary products, industrial enzymes and agricultural bioinputs
thesis_scope_note: Include as circular biomanufacturing, not agri-finance or traceability.
evidence_excerpt: Official technology page says ByBug Synthetics uses black soldier fly larvae as bioreactors to transform organic waste into recombinant proteins and bioinputs through synthetic biology and genetic engineering.

startup_summary_v1: Calice is an Argentine agtech platform that models interactions between genotype, environment and management to run virtual agronomic trials and predict product performance. Its environmental fingerprints and simulation tools help seed, biological-input and fertilizer companies place products in the right field conditions faster and with fewer physical trials. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as precision-ag and ag-input intelligence infrastructure.
business_one_liner: Virtual agronomic trials and product-placement intelligence for ag inputs.
problem_addressed: Physical agronomic trials are slow, costly and limited in their ability to capture environmental variability across fields and seasons.
technical_approach: Environmental modeling, probabilistic simulations, genotype-environment-management analytics and product-placement optimization.
industry_destination: Seed, biological-input, fertilizer and agrifood companies
thesis_scope_note: Include as decision infrastructure for material agricultural inputs, biologicals and crop performance.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes millions of virtual trials, environmental fingerprints and product placement optimization for seeds, biological inputs and fertilizers.

startup_summary_v1: Caligenia is an Argentine ag-biotech company developing BACTERCHAR, a soil-regeneration and carbon-storage amendment made by combining ancestral biochar-like soil practices with biotechnology and agriculturally relevant microorganisms. Its product transforms organic waste into a stable-carbon soil input that improves physical-chemical soil properties and microbial activity. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as carbon-negative biofertility, soil restoration and regenerative-agriculture infrastructure.
business_one_liner: BACTERCHAR soil-regeneration and carbon-storage amendment.
problem_addressed: Organic waste, degraded soils, carbon loss and dependence on less regenerative fertilization limit agricultural resilience.
technical_approach: Organic-waste transformation, biochar-like carbon storage, biotechnology and agricultural microorganisms combined into a soil amendment.
industry_destination: Agriculture, soil restoration and carbon storage
thesis_scope_note: Include as ag biologicals / regenerative soil technology with material climate relevance through stable carbon storage.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says Caligenia transforms organic waste into BACTERCHAR, combining ancestral soil amendment practices with biotechnology and microorganisms to improve soil properties, increase microbial activity and store stable carbon.

startup_summary_v1: Brazilian freight-management software platform that modernizes freight purchasing, quote equalization, carrier comparison, invoice auditing and logistics benchmarking across maritime, air, road and multimodal transport. problem_addressed: Manual freight procurement, spreadsheet-based quotation and inefficient logistics management.
technical_approach: Freight quote equalization, AI invoice auditing, carrier comparison and logistics benchmarking software.
thesis_scope_note: Exclude from BIO semantic universe: generic logistics software without specific biological, material-transition or planetary-boundary thesis.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes freight quote equalization, freight management, invoice auditing, benchmarking and logistics optimization across transport modes.

startup_summary_v1: CyanoMin is an Argentine environmental-biotech company developing biological desalination for hypersaline industrial brines from oil and gas, lithium and mining operations.
