business_one_liner: Microbial-metabolite nanodelivery platform for crop inputs.
problem_addressed: Crop protection and nutrition often depend on chemical inputs with inefficient delivery and environmental burden.
technical_approach: Microbial-metabolite bioactives integrated into nanostructured delivery systems for crops.
industry_destination: crop protection, plant health and regenerative agriculture
thesis_scope_note: Include as ag biologicals and nanodelivery for crop resilience.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes bio-nanosolutions for agriculture, microbial-metabolite nanodelivery, crop protection, plant resilience and field trials in Argentina, Brazil and Paraguay.

startup_summary_v1: Startup agrobiotech que activa mecanismos naturales de defensa de las plantas perdidos durante la domesticacion para mejorar resiliencia frente a plagas sin modificar geneticamente los cultivos. Entra en tesis por ag biologicals and crop resilience.
business_one_liner: Biotech to activate natural plant defenses.
problem_addressed: Cultivos domesticados con defensas naturales silenciadas y mayor vulnerabilidad frente a plagas.
technical_approach: Biomimesis de defensas de plantas silvestres para activar mecanismos que no se expresan bajo ataque.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por acople biologico directo con cultivos y resiliencia agroecologica, ademas de ser un buen caso biocentrico.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says Semion restores natural defense mechanisms lost during domestication and develops targeted solutions to activate plant defenses instead of killing pests or using GM.

startup_summary_v1: AgTech argentina que digitaliza la ultima milla del negocio de granos para acopios, distribuidores y productores. Entra en tesis por precision agriculture and resource intelligence.
business_one_liner: Grain operations and ag-retail platform.
problem_addressed: Fragmentacion operativa y baja visibilidad sobre contratos, entregas y transacciones del negocio de granos.
technical_approach: Plataforma web y app con CRM, gestion operativa, cotizaciones, pagos e integracion con ERPs para cadenas agricolas.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por fuerte acople material a cadenas agricolas reales, no como software horizontal.
evidence_excerpt: Public startup profile describes an agtech platform that digitalizes grain origination, producer relationships and agribusiness transactions for acopios and distributors.

startup_summary_v1: SiloReal provides infrastructure to remotely verify, digitalize and value agricultural assets in the field so they can be insured, financed and transacted as real collateral. The company is not biotech, but it is directly attached to material biological production systems because it makes crop and inventory assets legible for finance, insurance and trade. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as agri-finance and traceability infrastructure.
business_one_liner: Remote verification infrastructure for agricultural assets.
problem_addressed: Agricultural inventory and field assets are hard to verify remotely, limiting insurance, financing and collateral use.
technical_approach: Remote verification, digital asset records and valuation workflows for agricultural inventory and field assets.
industry_destination: agriculture, rural finance, insurance and commodity transactions
thesis_scope_note: Include as market infrastructure coupled to material crop systems.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes remote verification and digitalization of field assets so they can be insured, financed and transacted as collateral.

startup_summary_v1: Plataforma de agricultura inteligente para monitoreo de cultivos, geolocalizacion de datos y generacion de ordenes de trabajo en campo. Entra en tesis por precision agriculture and resource intelligence.
business_one_liner: Plataforma agtech para monitoreo de cultivos y decisiones agronomicas.
problem_addressed: Monitoreo ineficiente y toma de decisiones tardia en manejo agricola.
technical_approach: Datos geolocalizados de lote, monitoreo de plagas y enfermedades, analitica agronomica.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por sistema digital acoplado de forma clara a manejo material de cultivos, insumos y recursos.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes crop monitoring, geolocated data, analysis and application work orders across millions of hectares.

startup_summary_v1: Biotech terapéutica que desarrolla oligonucleótidos sintéticos para modular el sistema inmune y promover regeneración tisular. Entra en tesis por therapeutics and regenerative medicine.
business_one_liner: Synthetic oligonucleotide therapeutics company.
problem_addressed: Necesidad de terapias más seguras y duraderas para enfermedades inflamatorias crónicas y autoinmunes.
technical_approach: Desarrollo de drogas de oligonucleótidos de hebra simple con efecto inmunomodulador y regenerativo.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por plataforma terapéutica biológica e inmunológica clara.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes synthetic single-stranded oligonucleotide therapies that modulate the immune system and promote tissue regeneration, starting with Crohn's disease.

startup_summary_v1: SoyGREEN is an Argentine agricultural-microbiology startup developing biological solutions to mitigate climate change and transform farming. Its official site describes a UNRC and CONICET-UNRC scientific team validating its first bioinput, focused on reducing greenhouse-gas emissions, substituting chemical fertilizers and applying microbiological technologies to agriculture. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as ag biologicals and climate-mitigation bioinputs.
business_one_liner: Agricultural microbiology bioinputs for climate mitigation.
problem_addressed: Agriculture needs lower-emission and lower-chemical input systems that maintain productivity while reducing greenhouse-gas impacts.
technical_approach: Microbiological bioinput development, scientific validation and biological alternatives to chemical fertilizers.
industry_destination: Crop agriculture, biofertilizers and climate mitigation
thesis_scope_note: Include as core ag-biologicals and planetary-boundary agriculture technology.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes agricultural microbiology, biological solutions to mitigate global warming, first-bioinput validation by UNRC/CONICET scientists, GHG reduction and chemical-fertilizer substitution.

startup_summary_v1: Splight is a climate-tech company using AI to optimize electric grids, renewable-energy forecasting, DERMS, congestion management and grid resilience. It is outside narrow bio-based technology, but fits the planetary-boundary perimeter as clean-energy infrastructure. It should cluster with climate and resource intelligence, not agri intelligence or traceable markets.
business_one_liner: AI for grid optimization and renewable energy integration.
problem_addressed: Electric grids struggle to integrate variable renewable energy while managing congestion, forecasting and resilience.
technical_approach: AI models for renewable forecasting, distributed-energy management, congestion reduction and grid optimization.
industry_destination: renewable energy, electric grids and climate infrastructure
thesis_scope_note: Include as planetary-boundary energy transition infrastructure, not bio-based.
evidence_excerpt: Splight materials describe AI for renewable energy forecasting, DERMS, grid congestion reduction and resilience enhancement.

startup_summary_v1: Sylvarum is an Argentine agtech using non-thermal plasma and plant electro-hacking to improve seed quality, germination, vigor, pathogen control and yield without genetic modification or chemical residue. The technology is a physical-biological seed treatment that stimulates natural plant potential and reduces pesticide dependence. It should cluster with crop resilience, seed treatment, plant physiology and agricultural biologicals, not with climate monitoring.
business_one_liner: Non-thermal plasma seed-performance platform.
problem_addressed: Seed performance, pathogen pressure and crop vigor often require chemical treatment or produce inconsistent yields.
technical_approach: Non-thermal plasma seed treatment and controlled electrical stimulation of plant biological potential.
industry_destination: seeds, crop production and agricultural biologicals
thesis_scope_note: Include as biocentric seed-treatment and crop-resilience infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes non-thermal plasma seed treatment, chemical-free dry processing, germination/vigor improvement, pathogen control and yield improvement.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de tissue engineering que produce tejido corneal transplantable para restaurar la vision y reducir dependencia de tejido donado. Entra en tesis por therapeutics and regenerative medicine.
business_one_liner: Engineered corneal tissue platform.
problem_addressed: Escasez de tejido donante para trasplante de cornea y acceso limitado a restauracion visual.
technical_approach: Cultivo de celulas corneales sobre membranas biocompatibles para formar tejido transplantable.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por medicina regenerativa y biofabricacion de tejido.
evidence_excerpt: Official materials describe a project producing transplantable corneal tissue from cultured cells on a biocompatible membrane, with preclinical progress toward human trials.

startup_summary_v1: Biotech terapéutica AI-first que identifica small molecules para reprogramar redes de microRNA en enfermedades complejas. Entra en tesis por therapeutics and regenerative medicine.
business_one_liner: AI-driven microRNA therapeutics platform.
problem_addressed: Drug discovery todavía demasiado centrado en targets únicos y poco eficaz en enfermedades complejas multivía.
technical_approach: Plataforma de IA que busca small molecules capaces de restaurar el equilibrio de redes de microRNA asociadas a enfermedad.
industry_destination: Oncology, neurodegeneration, anemia and immune disorders
thesis_scope_note: Entra por plataforma terapéutica clara; la IA es habilitante pero el output es biológico y clínico.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes an AI platform that identifies small molecules capable of reprogramming disease-specific microRNA networks for complex diseases.

startup_summary_v1: Empresa de ingredientes plant-based que desarrolla sistemas proteicos vegetales e integrados para lanzar alimentos mas saludables y sustentables. Entra en tesis por food biotech and novel ingredients.
business_one_liner: Plant-based ingredient company.
problem_addressed: Dependencia de formulaciones alimentarias menos saludables y menos sustentables.
technical_approach: Diseno y produccion de sistemas proteicos vegetales y soluciones llave en mano para alimentos.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por transicion alimentaria material basada en ingredientes biologicos.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes integrated plant-protein systems and ingredient solutions for healthier and more sustainable foods.

startup_summary_v1: Infraestructura de trazabilidad colaborativa y pasaporte digital de producto para cadenas agroalimentarias e industriales. Entra en tesis por transparencia y MRV aplicado a cadenas materiales.
business_one_liner: Plataforma de trazabilidad y transparencia para cadenas productivas.
problem_addressed: Opacidad y greenwashing en cadenas de valor materiales.
technical_approach: Registro digital de eventos productivos, trazabilidad batch-level y pasaportes digitales.
industry_destination: Food, agriculture and industrial supply chains
thesis_scope_note: Entra por trazabilidad, transparencia y sostenibilidad aplicada a cadenas materiales reales.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes collaborative traceability, digital product passports and sustainability support across meat, fruit, wine and other production chains.

startup_summary_v1: Trebe Biotech is a food-biotech / biomanufacturing startup focused on making complex proteins simpler and more affordable. Public evidence is currently concise through the SF500 portfolio, but the semantic signal is protein production and biological manufacturing rather than generic food software. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a complex-protein platform linked to alternative ingredients and bioprocessing.
business_one_liner: Complex protein production platform.
problem_addressed: Complex proteins can be expensive, difficult to produce and hard to scale for food, health or industrial applications.
technical_approach: Biotechnology and biomanufacturing workflows for simpler and more affordable complex protein production.
industry_destination: food biotech, ingredients and biological manufacturing
thesis_scope_note: Include as food biotech / protein biomanufacturing; evidence depth remains portfolio-level.
evidence_excerpt: SF500 portfolio describes complex proteins, simple and affordable.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de diagnostico que usa peptidos sinteticos para habilitar testing distribuido. Entra en tesis por diagnostics and medtech.
business_one_liner: Diagnostics with synthetic peptides.
problem_addressed: Acceso limitado a diagnosticos robustos fuera de laboratorios centrales.
technical_approach: Plataforma diagnostica basada en peptidos sinteticos.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por diagnostica biologica concreta.
evidence_excerpt: GRIDX portfolio describes diagnostics everywhere with synthetic peptides.

startup_summary_v1: Startup agtech que desarrolla micropartÃ­culas naturales para mejorar el desempeÃ±o de agroinsumos y reducir dosis de quÃ­micos hasta en 80%. Entra en tesis por ag biologicals and crop resilience.
business_one_liner: Natural microparticles that make agrochemicals and biologicals more efficient.
problem_addressed: Gran parte de los herbicidas, pesticidas y fertilizantes se pierden en el ambiente en lugar de ser absorbidos por los cultivos.
technical_approach: MicropartÃ­culas basadas en polÃ­meros naturales que mejoran penetraciÃ³n y eficacia de crop protectants biolÃ³gicos y sintÃ©ticos.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por mejora material directa de sistemas agrÃ­colas y por transiciÃ³n hacia insumos mÃ¡s eficientes y compatibles con salud ambiental.
evidence_excerpt: SOSV says Unibaio uses natural microparticles to enhance crop protectants and reduce chemical application doses by up to 80%.

startup_summary_v1: Argentina/US drug-development company focused on refractory chronic wound healing. Its gel targets biofilm-forming bacteria and combines anti-pathogenic, anesthetic and pro-healing effects, including biofilm disruption, wound oxygenation and collagenization. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a human-health biotech and pharmaceutical wound-care company, with a clear biological mechanism and clinical development pathway rather than generic healthtech.
business_one_liner: Biotech drug development for chronic wounds.
problem_addressed: Refractory chronic wounds such as diabetic foot, pressure ulcers, venous ulcers and biofilm-infected postsurgical wounds.
technical_approach: Therapeutic gel with antibacterial, biofilm-disrupting, anesthetic and pro-healing mechanisms.
industry_destination: Chronic wound care, pharmaceutical biotech and regenerative healing
thesis_scope_note: Core include: biotechnology/pharmaceutical treatment for chronic wounds with biological mechanism and clinical pathway.
evidence_excerpt: UnTech says its chronic-wound gel works as anti-pathogenic, anesthetic and pro-healing treatment, disrupting biofilm-forming bacteria and supporting wound oxygenation and collagenization.

startup_summary_v1: Updairy is a Brazilian food-biotech company producing real dairy proteins without cows through precision fermentation. Its process uses microorganisms, including engineered fungi in bioreactors, to express dairy proteins that can be used as ingredients in dairy, bakery, confectionery, beverages and supplements. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as alternative-protein and acellular-agriculture infrastructure for lower-impact dairy ingredients.
business_one_liner: Animal-free dairy proteins through precision fermentation.
problem_addressed: Conventional dairy requires land, water, animals and greenhouse-gas-intensive production while plant alternatives often miss dairy taste and nutrition.
technical_approach: Precision fermentation using microorganisms/fungi in bioreactors to produce cow-equivalent dairy proteins for ingredient applications.
industry_destination: Dairy, bakery, confectionery, beverages and supplements
thesis_scope_note: Include as core food biotech: precision fermentation for animal-free dairy ingredients and protein transition.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says Updairy harnesses microorganisms to produce animal-free dairy proteins, copying cow genes into fungi that grow in bioreactors and produce dairy proteins for food applications.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de encapsulacion proteica inteligente para bioinsumos y decisiones biologicas mas precisas. Entra en tesis por ag biologicals and crop resilience.
business_one_liner: Smart protein-based encapsulation.
problem_addressed: Entrega suboptima de bioinsumos y menor precision en sistemas biologicos aplicados al agro.
technical_approach: Encapsulacion basada en proteinas para controlar liberacion y desempeno de soluciones biologicas.
thesis_scope_note: Entra como tecnologia habilitante de bioinsumos y agricultura regenerativa.
evidence_excerpt: GRIDX portfolio describes smart, protein-based encapsulation enabling nature to decide.

startup_summary_v1: Empresa de drones para logistica, inspeccion y vigilancia con conectividad satelital. Queda afuera porque hoy la señal principal es infraestructura aeroespacial generalista, no una intervencion thesis-core sobre sistemas vivos o limites planetarios.
business_one_liner: Drone logistics and aerial surveillance systems.
problem_addressed: Ineficiencias en logistica, ISR e inspeccion de infraestructura.
technical_approach: Plataformas de drones VTOL, conectividad satelital y sensores para logistica e inspeccion.
thesis_scope_note: Queda afuera por infraestructura aeroespacial generalista sin acople suficiente al nucleo bio/materiales o regenerativo.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes large-scale drone delivery, ISR and inspection systems with LEO satellite connectivity and urban operations.

startup_summary_v1: Innova Space deploys picosatellites and satellite-IoT connectivity for remote monitoring applications, including environmental sensing, water-quality monitoring, agriculture, maritime activity and remote infrastructure. It is not biotech and not generic aerospace for this project: its BIO VC LATAM relevance is planetary-boundary infrastructure that makes distributed environmental and agricultural systems observable. It should cluster with planetary monitoring, climate resilience and resource intelligence.
business_one_liner: Satellite IoT for environmental, water and agriculture monitoring.
problem_addressed: Remote environmental, water and agricultural systems often lack low-cost connectivity and real-time monitoring infrastructure.
technical_approach: Picosatellite constellation, satellite IoT connectivity and remote sensing workflows for distributed monitoring.
industry_destination: environmental monitoring, agriculture, water quality and remote infrastructure
thesis_scope_note: Include as planetary monitoring infrastructure, not as generic aerospace.
evidence_excerpt: Official site highlights environmental, farming, water-quality and maritime monitoring applications enabled by its satellite IoT platform.

startup_summary_v1: Empresa aeroespacial que desarrolla propulsion verde para satelites y spacecraft. Queda afuera porque, aunque habla de descarbonizar la economia espacial, sigue siendo infraestructura espacial generalista y no tesis-core.
business_one_liner: Green propulsion for satellites.
problem_addressed: Costos, toxicidad y friccion operativa en propulsion espacial de ultima milla.
technical_approach: Ingenieria aeroespacial de propulsion verde y bipropelente no toxico.
thesis_scope_note: Queda afuera por ser space-tech generalista con acople demasiado indirecto a limites planetarios.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes green, non-toxic propulsion systems for last-mile satellite delivery and spacecraft.

startup_summary_v1: Empresa de hardware espacial que desarrolla computadoras y electronica rad-tolerante para sistemas espaciales complejos. Queda afuera por ser infraestructura espacial generalista.
business_one_liner: High-performance space electronics.
problem_addressed: Limitaciones de performance y reutilizacion en electronica espacial.
technical_approach: Computadoras rad-tolerantes, SpaceVPX, FPGA IP cores y electronica para misiones espaciales.
thesis_scope_note: Queda afuera por ser space infrastructure sin señal thesis-core bio/material o regenerativa.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes tailored subsystems, rad-tolerant computers and electronics for capable space systems.

startup_summary_v1: Empresa de software de optimizacion cuantica para cargo logistico en aerolineas y barcos. Queda afuera porque la propuesta sigue siendo software/logistica generalista, aunque tenga narrativa de eficiencia y cero emisiones.
business_one_liner: Quantum optimization for cargo logistics.
problem_addressed: Ineficiencias en carga y operaciones logisticas de transporte.
technical_approach: Algoritmos cuanticos y software de optimizacion para cargo en aerolineas y barcos.
thesis_scope_note: Queda afuera por software logistico generalista sin acople suficiente al nucleo bio/materiales o regenerativo.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says it solves complex optimization problems for cargo logistics with quantum algorithms and supports transition to a zero-emission field.

startup_summary_v1: Satellites on Fire develops early wildfire detection and smart monitoring systems that combine satellites, cameras, proprietary AI models and alert workflows. It is not bio-based, but it is directly biocentric: the product protects forests, land, biodiversity, carbon stocks and human settlements by detecting fires before public satellite systems can respond. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as planetary-boundary and ecosystem-resilience infrastructure.
business_one_liner: Real-time wildfire detection using satellites, cameras and AI.
problem_addressed: Wildfires can spread before conventional public satellite monitoring or manual reporting detects them.
technical_approach: Satellite data, cameras, proprietary AI models and alert workflows for early fire detection.
industry_destination: forests, land management, conservation and climate-risk response
thesis_scope_note: Include as biocentric planetary-boundary infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes early fire detection, smart monitoring and alerts using satellites, cameras and proprietary AI, helping detect fires before public satellite systems.

startup_summary_v1: Satellogic operates an Earth-observation platform that provides high-frequency satellite imagery for environmental conservation, restoration, wildfire assessment, climate monitoring and natural-resource protection. It is outside narrow biotech, but inside the broader BIO VC LATAM perimeter as planetary-monitoring infrastructure: a tool for managing ecosystems, land use, climate risks and natural capital. It should cluster with climate and planetary intelligence.
business_one_liner: Earth-observation satellites for environmental and climate monitoring.
problem_addressed: Environmental, climate and land-use decisions often lack frequent, affordable and scalable observation data.
technical_approach: Satellite constellations, Earth-observation imagery and geospatial analytics for environmental monitoring.
industry_destination: environmental conservation, climate monitoring and natural-resource management
thesis_scope_note: Include as planetary-boundary monitoring infrastructure.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Earth Observation for environmental conservation, restoration, wildfire assessment, climate monitoring and natural resource protection.

startup_summary_v1: Empresa de comunicaciones opticas espaciales para transporte de datos en orbita. Queda afuera por ser infraestructura espacial y telecom generalista.
business_one_liner: Space optical communications.
problem_addressed: Cuellos de botella en transmision de datos desde y entre satelites.
technical_approach: Comunicaciones opticas y servicios de data relay en orbita.
thesis_scope_note: Queda afuera por infraestructura espacial generalista sin acople thesis-core a sistemas vivos o restauracion planetaria.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes space-based telecommunications and optical data transport services for satellite networks.

startup_summary_v1: Plataforma de IIoT e IA para manufactura, mantenimiento predictivo y optimizacion operativa en smart factories. Queda afuera por no ser una startup biobasada, biocentrica ni de restauracion de sistemas planetarios.
business_one_liner: Industrial IoT and AI platform for manufacturing operations.
problem_addressed: Ineficiencias operativas, downtime y costos en manufactura industrial.
technical_approach: IIoT, vision computacional, mantenimiento predictivo e inteligencia operacional.
thesis_scope_note: Queda afuera por software industrial generalista, aunque tenga modulos de energia y agua.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes AI and IIoT optimization for smart factories, monitoring assets, production, energy and water.

startup_summary_v1: Startup food biotech que construye infraestructura de produccion para carne cultivada, con foco en escalado modular y manufactura on-demand. Entra en tesis por su acople directo a agricultura celular y transicion proteica.
business_one_liner: Cultivated meat production infrastructure.
problem_addressed: Escalado industrial insuficiente para carne cultivada y otras plataformas de agricultura celular.
technical_approach: Infraestructura modular de produccion y escalado para cultivated meat.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por ser infraestructura bioindustrial para agricultura celular, no software horizontal.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says cell.farm is building modular, on-demand production infrastructure for cultivated meat to reach global scale.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de diagnostics que desarrolla soluciones innovadoras para la deteccion simple y precisa de enfermedades infecciosas, con una plataforma que minimiza el uso de agentes riesgosos. Entra en tesis por diagnostics and medtech.
business_one_liner: Infectious disease diagnostics company.
problem_addressed: Necesidad de pruebas simples, precisas y mas seguras para enfermedades infecciosas.
technical_approach: Desarrollo de diagnosticos y kits de deteccion con I+D propia y enfoque en menor riesgo biologico y ambiental.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por diagnostica concreta y materialidad biologica clara.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes innovative solutions for simple and precise detection of infectious diseases and highlights lower environmental and biological risk in production.

startup_summary_v1: Startup agtech que usa IA, ciencia de datos y vision computacional para escalar procesos agronomicos, ensayos de campo y decisiones regionales en agricultura. Entra en tesis por precision agriculture and resource intelligence.
business_one_liner: AI and data science for agronomic operations.
problem_addressed: Baja eficiencia y baja capacidad de decision sobre ensayos, lotes y riesgo productivo en agronegocios.
technical_approach: Modelos de IA, analitica agronomica, vision computacional y plataformas de decision para trials, campo y monitoreo regional.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por software fuertemente acoplado a produccion, insumos y riesgo material del sistema agropecuario.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes AI and data science solutions built exclusively for agriculture, from field trials and computer vision to regional climate and production risk analytics.

startup_summary_v1: Startup biotech que usa cultivo de celulas vegetales para desarrollar ingredientes y proteinas sostenibles para alimentos, salud, belleza y agricultura. Entra en tesis por food biotech and novel ingredients.
business_one_liner: Plant-cell biotechnology for sustainable ingredients.
problem_addressed: Dependencia de ingredientes animales, de bajo rendimiento o insustentables en multiples industrias.
technical_approach: Plataforma de cultivo de celulas vegetales para desarrollar lineas celulares e ingredientes de alto desempeno.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por plataforma biologica basada en sistemas vivos para producir ingredientes sostenibles.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes a platform using plant cells to develop next-generation sustainable ingredients for food, health, beauty and agriculture.

startup_summary_v1: Biomanufacturing company with deep expertise in precision fermentation, recombinant DNA technology and microbial cell factories. It produces animal-origin-free recombinant proteins, growth factors and cell-culture media supplements for biopharma, vaccines, cultured meat, regenerative medicine, food, health, nutrition and personal care. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as core bioindustrial infrastructure enabling animal-free inputs and scalable precision-fermentation manufacturing.
business_one_liner: Precision fermentation and recombinant biomanufacturing company.
problem_addressed: Animal-derived, less consistent or less traceable inputs in biopharma, cell culture, food and health markets.
technical_approach: Precision fermentation, recombinant DNA technology, microbial cell factories and CDMO biomanufacturing services.
industry_destination: Biopharma, vaccines, cultured meat, regenerative medicine, food, health, nutrition and personal care
thesis_scope_note: Core include: bioindustrial platform producing animal-free recombinant proteins and growth factors at manufacturing scale.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Laurus Bio as an integrated biomanufacturing organization with precision fermentation and recombinant DNA technology producing animal-free recombinant proteins, growth factors and CDMO services across biopharma, food, health and nutrition.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de biomateriales y quimica biobasada que desarrolla pigmentos bio-based trazables y validados para procesos textiles reales. Entra en tesis por biobased chemistry and advanced materials.
business_one_liner: Bio-based colors for textile processes.
problem_addressed: Dependencia de quimica textil mas riesgosa y de colorantes menos trazables.
technical_approach: Pigmentos bio-based integrables en procesos textiles existentes con validacion y trazabilidad.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por sustitucion material y reduccion de dependencia de quimica peligrosa.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes traceable, certified bio-based pigments validated in textile applications that reduce reliance on hazardous chemistry.

startup_summary_v1: SeedMatriz is an Argentine seed-technology company developing seed encapsulation and real-time agronomy tools to improve seed uniformity, nutrition, protection and field performance. Its approach intervenes directly in crop establishment by combining seed treatment, agronomic data and performance-enhancing coatings. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as seed-system and crop-resilience infrastructure.
business_one_liner: Seed encapsulation and crop-establishment technology platform.
problem_addressed: Uneven seed quality, weak crop establishment and inefficient early-stage nutrition or protection reduce agricultural performance.
technical_approach: Seed encapsulation, seed-quality analytics, agronomic monitoring and performance-enhancing crop treatment systems.
thesis_scope_note: Include as material seed technology for crop performance, resilience and lower-impact agricultural production.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes seed encapsulation technology to improve seed quality, nutrition, protection and agricultural performance with lower environmental impact.

startup_summary_v1: ViewMind develops neurocognitive diagnostics based on ocular digital phenotyping, measuring eye-movement responses to assess cognitive status and specific brain-health domains. Its technology supports diagnosis, monitoring and therapy-development workflows in neurology and pharma studies. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as non-invasive clinical diagnostics and medical-device infrastructure.
business_one_liner: Ocular digital phenotyping for neurocognitive diagnostics.
problem_addressed: Neurocognitive assessment is often late, subjective, invasive or hard to scale.
technical_approach: Eye tracking, ocular digital phenotyping and statistical brain-health models.
industry_destination: brain health, neurology and pharma studies
thesis_scope_note: Include as clinical diagnostics/medtech for brain health.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes ocular digital phenotyping technology to assess cognitive status through eye movement responses and specific cognitive domains.

startup_summary_v1: Wiagro monitors stored grain and silo bags using sensors, satellite connectivity, environmental data, predictive models and digital traceability. Its Smart Silobag system is designed to prevent post-harvest losses, improve proof of origin and give producers or grain operators real-time visibility. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as crop-supply-chain resilience infrastructure.
business_one_liner: Post-harvest grain monitoring and traceability platform.
problem_addressed: Stored grain can suffer post-harvest losses, low visibility and weak proof of origin.
technical_approach: Sensors, satellite connectivity, predictive models, traceability software and blockchain-enabled records.
thesis_scope_note: Include as monitoring and traceability infrastructure for biological crop supply chains.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says Smart Silobag combines sensor data, environmental information and predictive models to prevent post-harvest loss, improve traceability and provide proof of origin.

startup_summary_v1: Zavia Bio is an Argentine ag-biotech startup developing biological agro-inputs for more resilient and sustainable agriculture. Public profiles describe designer proteins and peptides that activate natural plant mechanisms at very low concentrations, using synthetic biology, AI and fermentation to address problems conventional agrochemicals have not solved. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as ag biologicals and biomolecule-based crop-resilience infrastructure.
business_one_liner: Designer-protein biological inputs for crop resilience.
problem_addressed: Agriculture needs new biological tools for drought, resilience and crop performance where conventional agrochemicals underperform.
technical_approach: Protein and peptide design, synthetic biology, AI and fermentation for biological agro-inputs.
industry_destination: Crop agriculture, biological inputs and climate resilience
thesis_scope_note: Include as ag-biologicals / designer-biomolecule platform for resilient agriculture; source remains public profile, but mechanism is specific and thesis-core.
evidence_excerpt: F6S describes Zavia Bio as developing novel biological agro-inputs using proteins and peptides designed with synbio and AI and produced by fermentation.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de molecular diagnostics con plataforma que puede instalarse en cualquier laboratorio. Entra en tesis por diagnostics and medtech.
business_one_liner: Lab-deployable molecular diagnostics platform.
problem_addressed: Baja disponibilidad de plataformas diagnosticas moleculares flexibles a escala global.
technical_approach: Plataforma molecular de diagnostico desplegable en laboratorios distribuidos.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por diagnostica molecular clara.
evidence_excerpt: GRIDX portfolio describes a molecular diagnostics platform that can be placed in any lab in the world.

startup_summary_v1: Startup agtech que digitaliza inspeccion, testeo y certificacion de commodities agricolas y alimentos mediante computer vision y machine learning. Entra en tesis por precision agriculture and resource intelligence.
business_one_liner: Computer-vision inspection and certification for agri commodities and food.
problem_addressed: Procesos de inspeccion y certificacion mas manuales, lentos o subjetivos en cadenas agroindustriales.
technical_approach: Reconocimiento varietal y analisis de calidad mediante computer vision y machine learning.
industry_destination: Agri commodities and food supply chains
thesis_scope_note: Entra como infraestructura de inteligencia material para commodities y alimentos, no como software horizontal.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says ZoomAgri is transforming testing, inspection and certification of agri commodities and food via computer vision and machine learning.

startup_summary_v1: Auravant provides precision-agriculture software that combines agronomic models, satellite imagery, georeferenced layers, operational records and traceability workflows for crop production. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as an intelligence layer for biological production systems: software, but directly coupled to field decisions, sustainability, yield and traceable management of material agriculture.
business_one_liner: Precision agriculture and agronomic decision platform.
problem_addressed: Farm decisions are fragmented across field data, imagery, records and operational workflows.
technical_approach: Agronomic models, satellite imagery, georeferenced layers and traceability tools for crop operations.
thesis_scope_note: Include as digital infrastructure tightly coupled to crop production systems.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes precision agriculture, agronomic models, satellite imagery and traceability to make crop production more efficient, sustainable and economically viable.

startup_summary_v1: BioMetallum is an Argentine biomining company using microorganisms, synthetic biology and AI-driven exploration to extract lithium and other metals with lower water use, fewer chemicals and reduced environmental impact. It is a high-fit planetary and biobased-industrial case because it applies living systems to critical-mineral extraction for the energy transition. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as biomining and resource-recovery infrastructure.
business_one_liner: Biomining and direct lithium extraction company.
problem_addressed: Critical-mineral extraction can be water-intensive, chemically intensive and environmentally damaging.
technical_approach: Microorganisms, synthetic biology and AI-assisted exploration for biomining and lithium extraction.
industry_destination: lithium, critical minerals and energy-transition materials
thesis_scope_note: Include as industrial biotechnology for critical minerals and resource recovery.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes BioMetallum as an Argentinian biomining startup using microorganisms, synthetic biology and AI-driven exploration for efficient lithium and metal extraction with lower water use and environmental impact.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de clean-tech industrial que usa plasma pyrolysis para convertir metano en hidrogeno limpio y carbono de alta conductividad, reduciendo emisiones y valorizando subproductos materiales. Entra en tesis por climate and resource systems.
business_one_liner: Plasma pyrolysis for clean hydrogen and conductive carbon.
problem_addressed: Dependencia de procesos emisivos para producir hidrogeno y baja valorizacion del carbono derivado del metano.
technical_approach: Pulsed nano plasma and plasma pyrolysis reactors integrated into industrial methane processes.
industry_destination: Industrial decarbonization, hydrogen and carbon materials
thesis_scope_note: Entra por descarbonizacion material e infraestructura industrial con fuerte acople a metano, hidrogeno y carbono reutilizable.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes plasma pyrolysis technology that converts methane into hydrogen and carbon, enabling on-site decarbonization without harmful emissions or water consumption.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de ocean carbon removal que combina ciencia marina, biogeoquimica, monitoreo y plataformas de inteligencia oceanografica para remover carbono y restaurar balance oceanico. Entra en tesis por su acople directo a sistemas planetarios.
business_one_liner: Ocean carbon removal and marine resilience platform.
problem_addressed: Necesidad de remover carbono atmosferico a escala y restaurar el equilibrio oceanico con integridad ambiental.
technical_approach: Microalgae carbon fixation and sinking, oceanographic intelligence, in-situ sensing and MMRV.
industry_destination: Ocean systems, carbon removal and climate resilience
thesis_scope_note: Entra por intervencion planetaria sobre sistemas oceanicos y remocion durable de carbono.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Gigablue as a science-led ocean carbon removal company using microalgae carbon fixation and sinking, oceanographic intelligence and environmental monitoring to restore ocean balance.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de critical materials que desarrolla una plataforma modular, limpia y adaptable para separar y refinar tierras raras con menor CAPEX, menor huella y menor dependencia geopolitica. Entra en tesis por transicion material y refinado sostenible de insumos criticos.
business_one_liner: Modular sustainable rare earth refining platform.
problem_addressed: Cuello de botella geopolitico y ambiental en el refinado de tierras raras para tecnologias limpias.
technical_approach: High-purity separation platform for rare earth refining, modular refining and advanced separation chemistry.
industry_destination: Rare earths, critical materials and clean technologies
thesis_scope_note: Entra por material transition en minerales criticos necesarios para EVs, wind turbines y semiconductores.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes a high-purity separation platform that unlocks scalable and sustainable rare earth refining for clean technologies such as EVs, wind turbines and semiconductors.

startup_summary_v1: LogShare is a Brazilian collaborative logistics platform that matches freight capacity, return routes and shipper demand to reduce empty trips, transport costs and avoidable emissions. Its system adds monitoring, traceability and CO2 analytics to cargo operations. It is a border case for BIO VC LATAM, included as planetary-boundary infrastructure for material supply-chain efficiency rather than as bio-based technology.
business_one_liner: Collaborative freight-sharing platform for lower-emission logistics.
problem_addressed: Cargo transportation creates avoidable emissions and costs when return routes, capacity and shipper demand are poorly coordinated.
technical_approach: Collaborative freight matching, backhaul sharing, route coordination, monitoring, traceability and CO2 analytics.
industry_destination: Cargo transportation, logistics and material supply chains
thesis_scope_note: Include as a planetary-boundary and logistics-efficiency edge case; keep separate from biological or agricultural clusters.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes collaborative freight sharing, route coordination, monitoring, traceability and CO2 reduction for cargo transportation and return freight.

startup_summary_v1: Solfium provides solar energy, storage and e-mobility solutions for homes, companies, industrial clients and corporate value chains, with an explicit model for decarbonization. It is not bio-based, but fits the broader planetary-boundary perimeter as clean-energy deployment infrastructure that can reduce emissions across material supply chains.
business_one_liner: Solar, storage and e-mobility deployment platform for value-chain decarbonization.
problem_addressed: Homes and companies face fragmented adoption of solar, storage and e-mobility solutions.
technical_approach: Solar deployment, storage, e-mobility solutions and corporate value-chain decarbonization programs.
industry_destination: energy transition, solar, storage and e-mobility
thesis_scope_note: Include as planetary-boundary transition infrastructure, not as biotech.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Solfium as a partner in solar energy, storage and e-mobility, including a corporate model to decarbonize value chains.

startup_summary_v1: Alytix is an Argentine bacteriophage biotechnology company developing prevention and treatment solutions for bacterial infections in animal and human health. Its platform combines phage discovery, metagenomic diagnostics, genomic analysis, bioinformatics and custom phage-cocktail design to address antibiotic resistance and farm-specific pathogens. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as phage therapeutics, animal-health biotech and One Health antimicrobial infrastructure.
business_one_liner: Bacteriophage therapeutics and prevention platform.
problem_addressed: Antibiotic resistance and hard-to-control bacterial infections in animal and human health.
technical_approach: Bacteriophage discovery, metagenomic diagnostics and phage-cocktail design with microbiological, genomic and bioinformatic tools.
thesis_scope_note: Include as a core biological therapeutic and preventive platform based on bacteriophages.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes bacteriophage-based solutions for infectious diseases in animal and human health, combining microbiological, genomic and bioinformatic tools.

startup_summary_v1: Compañia medtech especializada en sistemas de infusion, bombas y soluciones clinicas integradas para hospitales y terapias criticas. Se mantiene adentro como medtech clinico, aunque no como biotech.
business_one_liner: Advanced infusion systems and hospital medtech.
problem_addressed: Necesidad de infusion mas segura y eficiente en entornos clinicos complejos.
technical_approach: Infusion pumps, digital integration and hospital safety systems.
thesis_scope_note: Caso medtech confirmado por fuente oficial, con menor señal biotech que otros casos del universo.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Arcomed as an innovation leader in infusion systems and integrated hospital solutions focused on safety and clinical workflow.

startup_summary_v1: Startup therapeutics que desarrolla degradadores de proteinas mediante small molecules para cancer y enfermedades raras, aprovechando el sistema natural de eliminacion proteica de la celula.
business_one_liner: Targeted protein degradation therapeutics.
problem_addressed: Baja tratabilidad de proteinas asociadas a enfermedades raras y oncologia.
technical_approach: Small-molecule protein degraders and E3 ligase binders for targeted protein degradation.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por therapeutics con plataforma molecular propia.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes small-molecule degraders and E3 ligase binders to eliminate disease-causing proteins in rare diseases and oncology.

startup_summary_v1: Startup biotech clinica enfocada en obesidad y enfermedad metabolica, con candidatos terapeuticos que activan vias de termogenesis para tratar el balance energetico mas alla de los GLP-1.
business_one_liner: Thermogenesis-based obesity therapeutics.
problem_addressed: Falta de tratamientos sostenibles para obesidad y enfermedad metabolica.
technical_approach: Novel molecules targeting creatine-dependent thermogenesis and energy expenditure pathways.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por therapeutics claramente biomoleculares.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Eolo Pharma as a clinical-stage biotech developing obesity and metabolic disease therapies based on thermogenesis and energy expenditure pathways.

startup_summary_v1: Galtec Life is an Argentine biotech developing immunotherapies based on galectin modulation for cancer, autoimmune diseases and chronic inflammatory conditions. The semantic anchor is therapeutic immunology: the company designs biological interventions that act on galectin-mediated immune and inflammatory pathways. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a therapeutic biotech platform, not ag intelligence or generic life-science services.
business_one_liner: Galectin-modulating immunotherapies for cancer and inflammatory disease.
problem_addressed: Cancer, autoimmune and chronic inflammatory diseases require better immune-modulating therapeutic mechanisms.
technical_approach: Galectin modulation and immunotherapy development for oncology, autoimmunity and inflammation.
industry_destination: oncology, autoimmune and inflammatory disease therapeutics
thesis_scope_note: Include as core therapeutic biotechnology.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes immunotherapies based on galectin modulation for cancer, autoimmune diseases and chronic inflammatory conditions.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de ingredientes funcionales que convierte compuestos de origen vegetal en cuidado metabolico cotidiano para control glucemico y resiliencia metabolica.
business_one_liner: Metabolic health functional ingredient platform.
problem_addressed: Alta prevalencia de disfuncion glucemica y necesidad de prevencion metabolica escalable.
technical_approach: Plant-derived functional ingredient development for glycemic control.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por ingrediente funcional bio-based con aplicacion alimentaria y metabolica.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes a plant-based ingredient for blood-sugar control and metabolic resilience designed for everyday use.

startup_summary_v1: Argentine ag-biotech company discovering and developing botanical active ingredients for crop protection and plant stimulation. Its platform combines plant extract libraries, field collection, greenhouse trials and active-compound identification to create herbicide, antifungal, insecticide and biostimulant products of natural origin. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as core ag biologicals and botanical crop-resilience technology replacing synthetic crop-protection inputs.
business_one_liner: Botanical crop-protection ingredient discovery platform.
problem_addressed: Need for crop-protection products with new modes of action, lower residues and biological origin.
technical_approach: Plant extract libraries, field collection, greenhouse trials and active-compound identification for crop protection.
industry_destination: Agroindustry, crop protection and plant stimulation
thesis_scope_note: Core include: botanical active ingredients and biological crop-protection platform.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes discovery and development of botanical active ingredients for herbicide, antifungal, insecticide and stimulant uses in crop protection.

startup_summary_v1: Empresa biotech integrada que usa precision fermentation y microorganismos para desarrollar enzimas industriales, bioactivos y alternativas proteicas mas sustentables.
business_one_liner: Precision fermentation biosolutions platform.
problem_addressed: Procesos industriales costosos, contaminantes y poco eficientes en alimentos, biofuels y otras industrias.
technical_approach: Precision fermentation of microorganisms for enzymes, bioactives and alternative proteins.
industry_destination: Food, feed, biofuels, beauty and care
thesis_scope_note: Entra por biomanufacturing y bioindustry.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes a fully integrated biotech company using precision fermentation and microorganisms to produce enzymes, bioactives and alternative proteins.

startup_summary_v1: Plataforma de IA para retail que detecta expiraciones, faltantes y ejecucion promocional para reducir mermas y mejorar rotacion en alimentos y consumo masivo. Se mantiene adentro como caso borde de eficiencia material y desperdicio.
business_one_liner: AI copilot for retail waste and rotation management.
problem_addressed: Perdida de ventas y desperdicio por vencimientos, quiebres de stock y mala ejecucion en retail.
technical_approach: AI-powered expiry tracking, task prioritization and in-store validation using sales and shelf data.
thesis_scope_note: Caso borde que se mantiene por su impacto material sobre desperdicio y rotacion de alimentos, no por software horizontal generalista.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes AI for expiry-based stock accuracy, task prioritization and promotion execution to reduce losses in retail operations.

startup_summary_v1: Laurus AG Tech is an urban-farming startup building decentralized autonomous farms that produce fresh vegetables close to consumers. Its public profile describes low-CAPEX, low-OPEX systems deployed in unused city spaces to reduce logistics, increase access to affordable fresh produce and improve resource efficiency. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as controlled-environment food-production infrastructure, though it is an edge case rather than biotech.
business_one_liner: Autonomous urban farming network.
problem_addressed: Fresh vegetables are often produced far from cities, increasing logistics cost, freshness loss and environmental footprint.
technical_approach: Decentralized autonomous farms, controlled-environment production and low-cost urban deployment in unused spaces.
industry_destination: Urban food production and fresh vegetables
thesis_scope_note: Include as material food-production infrastructure with biocentric living-crop systems; edge because the mechanism is farming infrastructure, not biotech.
evidence_excerpt: F6S profile describes autonomous urban farms producing affordable fresh vegetables in decentralized city spaces with lower capital and operating costs.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de fertility diagnostics que combina evaluacion inflamatoria, edad reproductiva biologica y planes personalizados para acompanamiento de fertilidad y fallos de FIV.

problem_addressed: Baja capacidad de entender edad reproductiva e inflamacion asociada a fertilidad y fallos de FIV.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de descubrimiento de materiales que usa fisica avanzada y modelado molecular para acelerar I+D en quimica, energia, semiconductores y biotech con foco en materiales mas sustentables.

startup_summary_v1: MZP is a medtech diagnostics startup developing advanced coagulation testing for bleeding management in trauma, surgery, organ transplants and critical care. Its public profile points to point-of-care coagulation analysis and viscoelastic diagnostics that can help clinicians understand clotting defects and reduce unnecessary transfusions. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as clinical diagnostics infrastructure.
business_one_liner: Advanced coagulation diagnostics for critical care.
problem_addressed: Critical-care teams need faster, more precise coagulation assessment to manage bleeding and avoid unnecessary transfusions.
technical_approach: Point-of-care coagulation analysis and viscoelastic diagnostics for bleeding-risk management.
industry_destination: Critical care, surgery and transfusion medicine
thesis_scope_note: Include as clinical diagnostics with direct biological and hospital materiality; evidence is profile-level but specific enough for reviewed status.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de nanobiotech que desarrolla sistemas no virales de entrega genetica para terapias genicas y edicion, basados en nanoparticulas de oxidos metalicos.

problem_addressed: Limitaciones de vehiculos actuales para terapias genicas seguras, eficientes y accesibles.

thesis_scope_note: Entra por plataforma terapeutica de delivery genetico.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes a non-viral nanoparticle delivery library for gene therapies and gene-editing payloads.

startup_summary_v1: Startup foodtech que usa IA, bioinformatica y microorganismos para descubrir y producir ingredientes proteicos naturales y sustentables, incluyendo proteinas dulces.
business_one_liner: AI and bioinformatics for sustainable protein ingredients.
problem_addressed: Necesidad de ingredientes proteicos mas saludables, clean label y sustentables.

startup_summary_v1: Empresa biotech enfocada en desarrollo, transferencia y manufactura de biosimilares y biologicos, desde clones y procesos hasta lotes preclinicos y clinicos.

problem_addressed: Altos costos y complejidad en desarrollo y manufactura de biosimilares y biologicos.

startup_summary_v1: Nunatak Biotech designs plant-microorganism associations to restore soils and improve crop performance in adverse environments. Its official evidence points to plant-microbiome symbiosis, soil regeneration and biological crop resilience, making it a core ag-biologicals company. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as microbial / plant-microbiome infrastructure for regenerative agriculture.
business_one_liner: Plant-microbiome platform for soil restoration and crop resilience.
problem_addressed: Degraded soils and adverse growing conditions reduce crop performance and agricultural resilience.
technical_approach: Design of plant-microorganism associations and microbiome-based crop resilience systems.
industry_destination: crop production, soil restoration and regenerative agriculture
thesis_scope_note: Include as core ag biologicals / soil regeneration technology.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes plant-microbiome symbiosis design to restore soils and improve plant performance under adverse conditions.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de anticuerpos terapeuticos que integra high-throughput biology y AI/ML para descubrir programas oncologicos con datos derivados de pacientes desde etapas tempranas.
business_one_liner: Patient-centric oncology antibody discovery platform.
problem_addressed: Baja traslacion clinica de la oncologia cuando los pacientes se integran tarde al descubrimiento.
technical_approach: High-throughput biology and AI/ML for patient-derived oncology antibody discovery.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por therapeutics con fuerte componente computational pero outcome terapeutico claro.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes a platform therapeutics company using high-throughput biology and AI/ML to discover oncology antibody programs with patient-derived data.

startup_summary_v1: PLAMIC Biotech is an Argentine microfluidics startup developing lab-on-a-chip technology for nanomedicine formulation and personalized oncology treatment selection. Public sources describe microchannel chips that improve precision, reproducibility and scalability in nanomedicine production, plus predictive treatment testing from biopsy samples. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as microfluidic health-tech infrastructure for cancer therapeutics and personalized medicine.
business_one_liner: Microfluidic lab-on-a-chip cancer platform.
problem_addressed: Nanomedicine formulation and oncology treatment selection need more reproducible, scalable and patient-specific experimental platforms.
technical_approach: Microfluidic chip design, laminar-flow microchannels, nanomedicine synthesis and predictive treatment testing from biopsy samples.
industry_destination: Cancer therapeutics, nanomedicine and personalized medicine
thesis_scope_note: Include as microfluidics / medtech platform directly attached to oncology and nanomedicine workflows.
evidence_excerpt: Argentina.gob.ar describes PLAMIC as a microfluidic lab-on-a-chip platform for oncology nanomedicine synthesis and predictive treatment selection from patient biopsies; LinkedIn describes microfluidics for nanomedicine production.

startup_summary_v1: Startup therapeutics que desarrolla candidatos contra obesidad y enfermedades metabolicas a partir de termogenicos diseñados in silico para degradacion lipidica.
business_one_liner: Thermogenic obesity therapeutics.
problem_addressed: Falta de terapias especificas para obesidad y acumulacion lipidica con menos efectos secundarios.
technical_approach: In-silico design and in-vitro validation of thermogenic candidates targeting fat degradation pathways.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por therapeutics metabolicos.

startup_summary_v1: Startup de vacunas y terapias personalizadas que combina nanotechnology, AI y synthetic biology para entrenar celulas contra cancer y autoinmunidad.
business_one_liner: Personalized cancer vaccine and therapeutic platform.
problem_addressed: Necesidad de terapias mas precisas y personalizadas para cancer y enfermedades autoinmunes.
technical_approach: Nanotechnology, synthetic biology and bioinformatics for personalized cell-training therapeutics.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por therapeutics personalizadas.
