startup_summary_v1: Startup chilena que desarrolla un modelo colaborativo de cultivo regenerativo de algas para restaurar ecosistemas marinos, capturar carbono y activar economias costeras circulares. Entra en tesis por su intervencion directa sobre sistemas vivos y regeneracion de limites planetarios.
business_one_liner: Regenerative seaweed cultivation for marine restoration and coastal livelihoods.
problem_addressed: Degradacion de ecosistemas marinos costeros y falta de modelos productivos regenerativos para comunidades costeras.
technical_approach: Cultivo regenerativo de algas y articulacion colaborativa con comunidades costeras.
industry_destination: Marine ecosystems, coastal communities and blue bioeconomy
thesis_scope_note: Entra por regeneracion ecosistemica, biomasa marina y restauracion ambiental con base biologica.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes regenerative seaweed farming to restore marine ecosystems, capture carbon and create sustainable economic opportunities for coastal communities.

startup_summary_v1: Branch Energy deploys clean-energy and energy-management infrastructure, including on-site batteries and data analytics, to reduce customer energy costs, increase resilience and lower carbon emissions. It is not biotech, but it fits the broader planetary-boundary perimeter as emissions-reduction and resilience infrastructure for material systems. It should cluster with climate and resource intelligence rather than biofactories or medical devices.
business_one_liner: On-site batteries and clean-energy management platform.
problem_addressed: Energy users face high costs, grid fragility and carbon-intensive electricity consumption.
technical_approach: On-site batteries, clean-energy infrastructure and analytics for cost, resilience and emissions reduction.
thesis_scope_note: Include as planetary-boundary transition infrastructure, not as bio-based technology.
evidence_excerpt: LinkedIn company profile states that Branch Energy helps customers reduce energy costs while increasing resilience by deploying on-site batteries and other energy infrastructure.

startup_summary_v1: Radbio is a biotechnology company developing biologic therapeutics that target TGF-beta biology for fibrosis, complex chronic disease and cancer indications. Its official evidence centers on a novel biomolecule and therapeutic platform rather than diagnostics, agriculture or materials. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a core biologic-drug-development company working on frontier biomedicine.
business_one_liner: TGF-beta biologic therapeutics for fibrosis and cancer.
problem_addressed: Fibrosis, cancer and complex chronic diseases need new targeted biological mechanisms beyond conventional small-molecule treatment.
technical_approach: Biologic drug development focused on TGF-beta pathway modulation and novel biomolecule design.
industry_destination: fibrosis, oncology and complex chronic disease therapeutics
thesis_scope_note: Include as therapeutic biotechnology.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes a biotech company developing a novel biomolecule targeting TGF-beta for fibrosis and cancer indications.

startup_summary_v1: Startup ag biotech que desarrolla biobactericidas proteicos de alta precision para proteger cultivos frente a fitopatogenos bacterianos sin afectar microbiomas beneficiosos. Entra en tesis por su uso de biologia sintetica aplicada a resiliencia agricola.
business_one_liner: Precision protein biobactericides for crop protection.
problem_addressed: Enfermedades bacterianas en cultivos y dependencia de soluciones menos precisas o mas toxicas.
technical_approach: Plataforma de biologia sintetica para disenar y producir proteinas bactericidas especificas.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por biologia aplicada a sistemas vivos agricolas y salud del suelo.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes protein-based biobactericides and a synthetic biology platform to fight bacterial plant diseases while preserving microbiomes and soil health.

startup_summary_v1: Spin-off bioingenieril enfocada en producir tejido corneal funcional, biosintetico y trasplantable para restaurar vision y reducir costos de trasplante. Entra en tesis por ingenieria de tejidos y medicina regenerativa.
business_one_liner: Bioengineered corneal tissue for vision restoration.
problem_addressed: Escasez de tejido corneal para trasplantes y altos costos de restauracion visual.
technical_approach: Ingenieria de tejidos para cultivar y producir tejido corneal funcional y biocompatible.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por ingenieria de tejidos y medicina regenerativa aplicada.
evidence_excerpt: Tecnologico de Monterrey describes Ocular Bio Design as a tissue engineering spin-off creating functional, biosynthetic and biocompatible corneal tissue to restore vision.

startup_summary_v1: Startup argentina que desarrolla tests genomicos accesibles para pronosticar agresividad del cancer desde la biopsia inicial usando IA y tecnologia PCR disponible en laboratorios locales. Entra en tesis por precision oncology y diagnostico molecular.
business_one_liner: Affordable genomic cancer prognosis tests.
problem_addressed: Falta de pronosticos oncologicos precisos y accesibles en laboratorios locales.
technical_approach: Test genomico con IA y PCR para pronostico de cancer.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por diagnostico molecular y medicina de precision.
evidence_excerpt: GRIDX describes PreGen as an accessible genomic test that predicts prostate cancer aggressiveness from the initial biopsy using AI trained on more than 5,000 tumors.

startup_summary_v1: Empresa de desarrollo de software a medida para clientes corporativos de multiples industrias. Queda fuera de tesis por no mostrar una propuesta bio-based, biocentrica ni regenerativa propia.
business_one_liner: Custom software development services company.
problem_addressed: Necesidades generales de desarrollo de software y sistemas empresariales.
technical_approach: Servicios de diseno y desarrollo de software para terceros.
thesis_scope_note: Sale de tesis por ser una software house generalista sin acople material o biocentrico propio.
evidence_excerpt: Official site presents Abastra as a software design and development company serving multiple industries with custom technological solutions.

startup_summary_v1: Operador o venture studio de comercio digital y servicios transfronterizos. Queda fuera de tesis porque la evidencia publica apunta a ecommerce, brand development, adquisiciones y servicios tecnologicos, sin materialidad bio o planetaria defendible.
business_one_liner: Cross-border digital commerce and services venture.
problem_addressed: Necesidades de crecimiento, operacion y automatizacion de negocios digitales o de servicios.
technical_approach: Ecommerce operations, brand development, digital strategy and technology services.
thesis_scope_note: Sale por ser una capa digital/servicios sin acople directo a sistemas vivos, cadenas biobasadas o limites planetarios.
evidence_excerpt: Public site describes a cross-border innovation and brand development company that builds, operates and scales digital-first businesses across North America and Latin America.

startup_summary_v1: Startup colombiana de economia circular que conecta generadores, recolectores y procesadores de materiales reciclables mediante una plataforma B2B con trazabilidad y coordinacion operacional. Entra por su rol directo en recuperacion de materiales y limites planetarios.
business_one_liner: B2B circular recycling and traceability platform.
problem_addressed: Fragmentacion, informalidad y baja trazabilidad en cadenas de reciclaje y recuperacion de materiales.
technical_approach: Plataforma end-to-end para orquestar reciclaje, trazabilidad, datos y coordinacion entre generadores, recolectores y procesadores.
industry_destination: Recycling, circular economy and material recovery
thesis_scope_note: Entra por infraestructura material de economia circular y recuperacion de recursos, no por software horizontal.
evidence_excerpt: F6S describes MUTA as an all-in-one B2B circular economy platform connecting generators with processors and orchestrating the recycling supply chain with traceability and data.

startup_summary_v1: Foodtech brasilena que desarrolla bebidas y alimentos plant-based a base de avena, con foco en menor impacto ambiental y transparencia de huella de carbono. Entra por transicion alimentaria biobasada y sustitucion parcial de productos lacteos animales.
business_one_liner: Oat-based plant dairy and climate-transparent food brand.
problem_addressed: Dependencia de alimentos lacteos animales de mayor impacto y baja transparencia climatica en consumo masivo.
technical_approach: Formulacion de alimentos vegetales de avena, medicion de huella de carbono y desarrollo de productos plant-based.
industry_destination: Plant-based dairy alternatives and food retail
thesis_scope_note: Entra como foodtech biobasada de transicion alimentaria y baja huella, aunque es mas consumer brand que plataforma biotech profunda.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Nude as a Brazilian oat-based foodtech making plant-based dairy alternatives with low impact, B Corp certification and carbon footprint transparency.

startup_summary_v1: Plataforma de orquestacion de pagos y checkout global con liquidacion en USDT para negocios digitales. Queda fuera de tesis por ser fintech/payment infrastructure sin materialidad bio, biobased ni regenerativa.
business_one_liner: Cross-border payments orchestration platform.
problem_addressed: Friccion de cobros internacionales, metodos de pago locales y liquidacion para negocios digitales.
technical_approach: Checkout, links de pago, integraciones ecommerce, pagos locales y settlement en USDT.
thesis_scope_note: Sale por ser infraestructura financiera digital generalista, sin acople especifico a sistemas bio/materiales.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes ONE as a payment orchestration platform for digital businesses, with checkout, payment links, local payment methods and USDT settlement.

startup_summary_v1: Radial transforms organic residues into fungal materials for lower-impact material applications. The semantic anchor is simple and strong: fungal biology, waste valorization and biomaterial production. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a biobased materials startup, not as circularity software or generic resource recovery.
business_one_liner: Fungal biomaterials made from residues.
problem_addressed: Material production depends on extractive feedstocks while organic residues remain underused.
technical_approach: Fungal growth and residue transformation into usable biomaterial formats.
industry_destination: biomaterials, packaging, design and low-impact materials
thesis_scope_note: Include as core biobased material and residue valorization.
evidence_excerpt: GRIDX portfolio says Radial transforms residues into fungal materials.

startup_summary_v1: Plataforma mexicana de orquestacion de pagos para ecommerce que mejora aceptacion y ruteo de transacciones entre procesadores. Queda fuera por fintech/payment infrastructure sin materialidad bio o planetaria propia.
business_one_liner: Payment orchestration for ecommerce.
problem_addressed: Rechazos de pagos, integracion fragmentada de procesadores y baja conversion en ecommerce.
technical_approach: API de payment orchestration, routing inteligente, multiples pasarelas y metodos de pago.
thesis_scope_note: Sale por ser fintech B2B generalista, no una startup BIO VC LATAM.
evidence_excerpt: F6S describes RetryPay as a payment options platform for ecommerce with multiple gateways, aggregators and acquirers to increase payment acceptance without increasing fraud.

startup_summary_v1: Plataforma de retail autonomo que usa computer vision, AI y sensores para tiendas sin checkout y analitica operacional. Queda fuera porque es automatizacion retail, no una solucion bio/material/regenerativa.
business_one_liner: Autonomous retail computer vision platform.
problem_addressed: Filas, checkout manual, merma y baja visibilidad operacional en tiendas fisicas.
technical_approach: Computer vision, AI, sensores, basket tracking y analitica de tienda en tiempo real.
thesis_scope_note: Sale por ser tecnologia retail horizontal; aunque toque supermercados, no transforma sistemas bio/materiales por si misma.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Sensei as autonomous retail technology using computer vision and AI for checkout-free stores, shelf inventory visibility and retail automation.

startup_summary_v1: Plataforma enterprise de AI para ejecucion retail y CPG, con vision computacional para auditar gondolas, planogramas, inventario y recomendaciones comerciales. Queda fuera por ser retail SaaS/CPG intelligence sin materialidad bio propia.
business_one_liner: AI retail execution and shelf intelligence platform.
problem_addressed: Baja visibilidad de inventario, ejecucion comercial y cumplimiento de planogramas en retail.
technical_approach: Computer vision, offline AI, shelf image recognition, demand forecasting and replenishment recommendations.
industry_destination: Consumer goods brands and retail execution
thesis_scope_note: Sale por ser software de ejecucion retail para CPG, no una startup bio/material aunque pueda operar sobre categorias de alimentos.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Wisy as an enterprise AI co-pilot for retail execution that automates shelf data collection and provides real-time recommendations for CPG brands and retailers.

startup_summary_v1: Infraestructura fintech B2B para que empresas lancen y operen productos de credito digital. Queda fuera de tesis por ser lending-as-a-service y scoring financiero sin materialidad bio, biobased ni regenerativa.
business_one_liner: B2B credit infrastructure for companies.
problem_addressed: Acceso, operacion y escalamiento de programas de credito para clientes B2B y PyMEs.
technical_approach: APIs de credito, AI scoring, KYC/KYB, loan management y collections.
thesis_scope_note: Sale por fintech digital generalista, aunque tenga clientes de consumo masivo.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes AltScore as B2B credit infrastructure to launch, operate and scale credit programs.

startup_summary_v1: Uruguayan biotech developing cosmetic active ingredients from Antarctic extremophile enzymes that repair UV-induced DNA damage in skin cells. Its photolyase-based technology targets CPD and related DNA lesions, penetrates skin cells, reaches the nucleus and is validated through ex vivo and clinical studies. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as extremophile enzyme biotech, bioactive ingredient biomanufacturing and skin-health molecular repair.
business_one_liner: Extremophile enzyme skin DNA repair ingredients.
problem_addressed: UV-induced DNA damage, photo-aging and lack of active ingredients that repair damage at the cellular origin.
technical_approach: Antarctic photolyase enzymes, skin-cell penetration, nuclear localization and DNA lesion repair.
industry_destination: Skin health, dermocosmetics, bioactive ingredients and personal care
thesis_scope_note: Core include: enzyme biotechnology from Antarctic microorganisms for molecular DNA repair, even though the market is cosmetics/wellness.
evidence_excerpt: Antarka says its Antarctic enzyme repairs UV-induced DNA damage at the cellular level, shows nuclear ingress, 100 percent CPD DNA repair and clinical skin-firmness and elasticity improvements.

startup_summary_v1: Biotech chilena de acuicultura que desarrolla tratamientos preventivos para activar la inmunidad de peces, mejorar supervivencia y reemplazar antibioticos. Entra por animal health, proteinas biologicas y transicion material de acuicultura.
business_one_liner: Fish immunity biotech for sustainable aquaculture.
problem_addressed: Uso de antibioticos, enfermedades infecciosas y mortalidad en salmonicultura y acuicultura.
technical_approach: Identificacion y produccion de proteinas inmunoactivadoras, proteomica, bioinformatica y desarrollo de productos para salud animal acuicola.
thesis_scope_note: Entra claramente por animal biotech aplicada a sistemas vivos productivos y reduccion de antibioticos.
evidence_excerpt: F6S describes AQUIT as developing technology that enhances fish immunity, improves survival rates and replaces antibiotics in aquaculture.

startup_summary_v1: Biotech terapeutica con operaciones en Uruguay y Argentina que desarrolla inmunoterapia oncologica dirigida a TMEM176A/B. Entra por drug discovery e inmuno-oncologia.
business_one_liner: Targeted cancer immunotherapy platform.
problem_addressed: Necesidad de nuevas terapias para cancer y resistencia a estandares oncologicos actuales.
technical_approach: Moduladores small-molecule de TMEM176A/B para reprogramar respuestas inmunes antitumorales.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por therapeutics biologicamente dirigidas e inmunoterapia.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Ardan Pharma as developing a first-in-class targeted immunotherapy based on small-molecule modulators of TMEM176A/B.

startup_summary_v1: Infraestructura de identidad digital, credenciales verificables, billetera y firmas electronicas con criptografia poscuantica. Queda fuera por ser infraestructura digital horizontal sin materialidad BIO.
business_one_liner: Digital identity and verifiable credential infrastructure.
problem_addressed: Fraude, friccion y baja privacidad en verificacion de identidad e interacciones digitales.
technical_approach: Credenciales verificables, wallet, APIs, criptografia y firma electronica.
industry_destination: Digital identity, benefits and credential verification
thesis_scope_note: Sale por digital identity/blockchain infrastructure, no por bio/material/planetary stewardship.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Blerify as infrastructure to issue and verify digital credentials, digital benefits, vouchers and electronic signatures.

startup_summary_v1: Calfix is an Argentine biotech-materials startup developing biotechnology solutions for repairing cracks in concrete. The public company profile is still thin, but it specifically positions Calfix Bio around biotech solutions for concrete cracks, making the thesis fit clear: a biological or biomaterial route for construction-material repair. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as an early, source-thin biobased construction-materials case.
business_one_liner: Biotech concrete crack repair platform.
problem_addressed: Concrete infrastructure suffers cracking and repair processes that can be toxic, costly or material-intensive.
technical_approach: Biotechnology and applied chemistry for concrete crack repair and construction-material maintenance.
thesis_scope_note: Include as biobased/materials edge case; reviewed for scope but still a priority for direct-source enrichment.
evidence_excerpt: LinkedIn public company profile describes Calfix Bio as biotechnology research focused on biotech solutions for concrete cracks.

startup_summary_v1: Cytbac is an Argentine biotechnology startup developing vaccines and immunotherapies for humans and animals using predictive genomics, AI/ML and genetically engineered insect-virus vectors. Public WISE evidence frames the platform as a way to deliver pathogen or tumor fragments and trigger stronger cellular immune responses. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a core therapeutic biotech platform, not as ag intelligence or generic software.
business_one_liner: Genetically engineered vaccine and immunotherapy platform.
problem_addressed: Many vaccine and immunotherapy approaches are slow to design and may not induce strong cellular immune responses.
technical_approach: Predictive genomics, AI/ML and engineered insect-virus vectors for antigen delivery.
thesis_scope_note: Include as core therapeutic biotechnology.
evidence_excerpt: WISE Latin America describes Cytbac as an Argentine biotech startup with a disruptive vaccine and therapy platform for humans and animals.

startup_summary_v1: Edtech argentina de cursos online de programacion. Queda fuera de tesis por education/software sin materialidad bio, biobased ni regenerativa.
business_one_liner: Online programming education platform.
problem_addressed: Acceso a formacion en programacion y capacitacion laboral.
technical_approach: Plataforma online de cursos y contenidos de programacion.
thesis_scope_note: Sale por edtech generalista.
evidence_excerpt: Public company profile describes Egg as a Mendoza-based company providing online programming courses and tutorials.

startup_summary_v1: Startup argentina de agrobiotecnologia que desarrolla tecnologias geneticas para convertir cultivos anuales en perennes, aumentando productividad, resiliencia y salud del suelo. Entra por crop resilience y genetics.
business_one_liner: Perennial crop genetics and plant resilience platform.
problem_addressed: Fragilidad de cultivos anuales, degradacion de suelo y necesidad de modelos productivos mas sostenibles.
technical_approach: Tecnologias geneticas y biotecnologia vegetal para extender ciclos de vida e incrementar resiliencia de cultivos.
industry_destination: Seed, crop genetics and sustainable agriculture
thesis_scope_note: Entra claramente por agrobiotecnologia y resiliencia de sistemas vegetales.
evidence_excerpt: LinkedIn describes Infira as an Argentine agrobiotech developing plant genetics technology to extend crop life cycles and improve production and resilience.

startup_summary_v1: Fintech argentina de pagos digitales con conectividad alternativa para operar incluso sin internet. Queda fuera por infraestructura de pagos, sin materialidad BIO directa.
business_one_liner: Offline-capable payment infrastructure.
problem_addressed: Brecha entre efectivo y pagos digitales en zonas con baja conectividad.
technical_approach: Pagos as-a-service, marca blanca y redes alternativas como radiofrecuencia para transacciones offline.
thesis_scope_note: Sale por fintech/payments generalista; no transforma directamente sistemas bio/materiales.
evidence_excerpt: Forbes describes INI as an Argentine fintech that connects virtual payments with alternative connectivity such as radiofrequency to process payments without internet.

startup_summary_v1: Argentine biotech initiative focused on advanced biomolecular alternatives to traditional antibiotics for human health and animal production. The project is backed by CITES and UOVO and aims to develop antimicrobial R&D capacity around biomolecules that can address infectious disease and antibiotic-resistance challenges. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as antimicrobial biotech spanning therapeutics, animal health and One Health applications.
business_one_liner: Advanced biomolecular alternatives to antibiotics.
problem_addressed: Antibiotic resistance and limited alternatives to traditional antibiotics in human health and animal production.
technical_approach: R&D of biomolecular antimicrobial solutions and biotech development infrastructure.
industry_destination: Human health, animal production, antimicrobials and One Health
thesis_scope_note: Core include: antimicrobial biotech and biomolecular alternatives to antibiotics, though source depth is still medium.
evidence_excerpt: CITES describes Pepton as an initiative focused on R&D of advanced biomolecular solutions to provide alternatives to traditional antibiotics in health and animal production.

startup_summary_v1: PhylumTech is an Argentine life-science tools company combining biotechnology, automation, software and bioinformatics to automate compound screening in small-animal models for cloud-based drug discovery. Its WMicrotracker systems support experiments in worms, fish, invertebrates and other small organisms to measure drug effects faster and more accessibly. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as biological R&D infrastructure and drug-discovery automation.
business_one_liner: Small-animal drug discovery automation platform.
problem_addressed: Slow, expensive and hard-to-scale experimentation in new-molecule discovery and biological research.
technical_approach: Automated hardware, software and cloud workflows for measuring compound effects in worms, fish, invertebrates and other small-animal models.
thesis_scope_note: Include as life-science research tools and computational biology infrastructure directly coupled to drug discovery.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes PhylumTech as combining biotechnology, automation, software and bioinformatics to build small-animal experimentation products and drug-discovery-in-the-cloud solutions.

startup_summary_v1: Startup uruguaya de biomateriales que desarrolla polimeros superabsorbentes bio-based y biodegradables para reemplazar materiales petroquimicos en higiene, agricultura y otras industrias. Entra por materiales biobasados y descarbonizacion industrial.
business_one_liner: Bio-based biodegradable superabsorbent polymers.
problem_addressed: Dependencia de polimeros superabsorbentes derivados del petroleo y baja biodegradabilidad en productos de alto volumen.
technical_approach: Fermentacion microbiana, biopolimeros naturales, extremophile biotechnology y adaptacion industrial de materiales.
industry_destination: Hygiene materials, agriculture and advanced materials
thesis_scope_note: Entra claramente por biomateriales, biomanufactura y sustitucion de petroquimicos.
evidence_excerpt: LinkedIn describes POLYMERA as a deep-tech biomaterials platform replacing petrochemical polymers with high-performance bio-based materials, starting with bio-based superabsorbent polymers.

startup_summary_v1: Biotech argentina que desarrolla antimicrobianos de nueva generacion contra infecciones resistentes asociadas a biofilms usando compuestos de microbiota local. Entra por therapeutics, AMR y biologia aplicada a infecciones.
business_one_liner: Anti-biofilm antimicrobial biotech platform.
problem_addressed: Resistencia antimicrobiana y biofilms que vuelven menos eficaces los antibioticos existentes.
technical_approach: Compuestos biologicos/microbiota local y formulaciones antimicrobianas contra biofilms resistentes.
industry_destination: Human infectious disease and antimicrobial resistance
thesis_scope_note: Entra por plataforma terapeutica contra AMR y biofilms.
evidence_excerpt: LinkedIn describes Resistia as developing next-generation antimicrobials against resistant biofilm-related infections and biological solutions to restore effectiveness of existing antibiotics.

startup_summary_v1: Firma de venture capital enfocada en deep tech y AI. Queda fuera porque es inversor, no startup del universo mapeado.
business_one_liner: Deep-tech venture capital firm.
problem_addressed: Necesidad de capital y acompanamiento para founders.
technical_approach: Inversion y soporte a startups.
thesis_scope_note: Sale por ser fondo/inversor, no empresa startup objetivo de esta capa.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Ethos as a venture capital firm investing in and serving entrepreneurs.

startup_summary_v1: Plataforma fintech de compensaciones y beneficios de salud flexibles para colaboradores y jubilados. Queda fuera por health-fintech/benefits, no por medtech o biotech.
business_one_liner: Flexible health benefits and compensation platform.
problem_addressed: Ineficiencias en presupuesto de compensaciones y beneficios de salud corporativos.
technical_approach: Marketplace/fintech de beneficios, medicamentos, nutricion, psicologia y compensacion flexible.
industry_destination: Financial services, HR benefits and healthcare access
thesis_scope_note: Sale por health benefits fintech, sin desarrollo bio/medtech propio.
evidence_excerpt: LinkedIn describes Flexza as financial services for flexible health benefits and intelligent compensation.

startup_summary_v1: Gameet is an Argentine reproductive-biotech startup developing 3D-printed microdevices to optimize the production of healthy human embryos in assisted-reproduction workflows. Its technology sits at the intersection of medtech, embryology and reproductive biology: a physical microdevice designed to improve biological outcomes in fertility treatment. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as reproductive medtech and bioinstrumentation.
business_one_liner: 3D-printed microdevice platform for assisted reproduction.
problem_addressed: Assisted reproduction can suffer from inconsistent embryo-production conditions and limited biological optimization.
technical_approach: 3D-printed microdevices and controlled assisted-reproduction workflows for embryo development.
industry_destination: fertility clinics and assisted reproduction laboratories
thesis_scope_note: Include as reproductive medtech / bioinstrumentation.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Gameet as a biotechnology startup optimizing healthy human embryo production through 3D-printed microdevices for assisted reproduction.

startup_summary_v1: Plataforma mexicana de inversion, brokerage y wealth management. Queda fuera por fintech/investment platform sin materialidad BIO.
business_one_liner: Digital investment and brokerage platform.
problem_addressed: Acceso y gestion digital de inversiones.
technical_approach: App y plataforma de brokerage, trading, asset management y wealth management.
thesis_scope_note: Sale por infraestructura financiera generalista.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes GBM as a Mexican investment ecosystem with brokerage, trading, funds and wealth products.

startup_summary_v1: Invitrall is a biotechnology company developing in-vitro human organ models to evaluate compound efficacy and toxicity with higher biological relevance than conventional preclinical assays. Its core is organ-model and organoid-like testing infrastructure for drug discovery, toxicology and translational medicine. It is not a food ingredient or biofactory case; it should cluster with regenerative medicine, human organ models, drug testing and therapeutic R&D infrastructure.
business_one_liner: In-vitro human organ models for efficacy and toxicity testing.
problem_addressed: Drug discovery and toxicology testing often rely on models that poorly predict human organ-level biological response.
technical_approach: In-vitro human organ models for biologically relevant efficacy and toxicity evaluation.
industry_destination: drug discovery, toxicology, pharma R&D and regenerative medicine
thesis_scope_note: Include as therapeutic R&D / organ-model infrastructure, not food biotech.
evidence_excerpt: GRIDX portfolio says Invitrall develops in-vitro human organ models for evaluating efficacy and toxicity.

startup_summary_v1: Aplicacion cripto/fintech de consumo. Queda fuera por infraestructura financiera digital sin materialidad bio, biobased o regenerativa.
business_one_liner: Consumer crypto wallet and financial app.
problem_addressed: Friccion de acceso a pagos y activos cripto para consumidores.
technical_approach: Wallet, tarjeta, pagos y servicios cripto/fintech.
thesis_scope_note: Sale por fintech/crypto generalista.
evidence_excerpt: Public signals identify Lemon as a consumer crypto-fintech app rather than a BIO startup.

startup_summary_v1: Startup biotech que produce grasas y aceites sostenibles con precision fermentation usando levaduras salvajes no GMO. Entra por food ingredients / biomateriales para alimentos y cosmetica.
business_one_liner: Precision-fermented sustainable fats and oils.
problem_addressed: Dependencia de aceites y grasas como palma, cacao o shea con alta huella social y ambiental.
technical_approach: Coleccion de levaduras salvajes, lipid profiling y precision fermentation para producir grasas equivalentes funcionalmente.
industry_destination: Food, cosmetics and personal care ingredients
thesis_scope_note: Entra por ingrediente biofabricado de sustitucion material.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Levya as producing sustainable fats and oils using wild non-GMO yeasts and precision fermentation.

startup_summary_v1: Lipock develops lipid nanocapsules that improve the efficacy of volatile and hydrophobic active compounds. The core semantic signal is drug delivery and bioactive formulation: nanoscale lipid encapsulation used to stabilize, deliver or improve actives that are otherwise difficult to formulate. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as nanomedicine / formulation infrastructure for therapeutics, cosmetics or bioactive health products.
business_one_liner: Lipid nanocapsule platform for volatile and hydrophobic actives.
problem_addressed: Volatile and hydrophobic active compounds can be difficult to stabilize, formulate and deliver effectively.
technical_approach: Lipid nanocapsule formulation for encapsulation, stabilization and controlled delivery of active compounds.
industry_destination: therapeutics, cosmetics and bioactive health-product formulation
thesis_scope_note: Include as biomedical formulation and drug-delivery technology.
evidence_excerpt: GRIDX portfolio says Lipock develops lipid nanocapsules that improve the efficacy of volatile and hydrophobic actives.

startup_summary_v1: Infraestructura digital para ticketing y reventa oficial entre fans. Queda fuera por software de entretenimiento sin materialidad BIO.
business_one_liner: Ticketing and fan exchange infrastructure.
problem_addressed: Mercado informal y poco seguro de intercambio de entradas.
technical_approach: Software y marketplace integrado para ticketing y exchange.
thesis_scope_note: Sale por SaaS de ticketing.
evidence_excerpt: Public LinkedIn evidence shows menta tech building ticket exchange infrastructure in Argentina.

startup_summary_v1: metaBIX Biotech is a Uruguayan bio-vigilance company combining environmental sampling, biotechnology hardware and AI models to predict disease and microbiological contamination risks. Its platform analyzes environmental samples to generate early warnings for plants, animals, humans and food-production systems. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as pathogen intelligence, biosecurity and prevention infrastructure across living systems.
business_one_liner: Environmental sampling and AI bio-vigilance platform.
problem_addressed: Disease and contamination risks in plants, animals, humans and food systems are often detected too late.
technical_approach: Environmental sample collection, biotechnology hardware and AI models for infection-pressure and contamination early warning.
industry_destination: food production, animal health, plant health, human health and biosecurity
thesis_scope_note: Include as diagnostics / biosecurity infrastructure for living systems.
evidence_excerpt: MTEC describes metaBIX as using AI and biotechnology for disease prediction and early warning systems from environmental samples, with hardware, biotechnology and AI for infection-pressure assessment.

startup_summary_v1: Nairotech is an Argentine materials company working with special polymers, composites and nanotechnology, including antimicrobial polyolefin pellets designed to reduce the persistence of viruses, bacteria and fungi on surfaces. The bio signal is not that the material is biobased; it is an advanced-material intervention at the biological interface, with applications in safer surfaces, packaging and industrial substitution. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as functional materials with antimicrobial and public-health relevance.
business_one_liner: Antimicrobial polymer and nanotechnology materials platform.
problem_addressed: Conventional polymers and surfaces can carry persistent microbial contamination and lack functional antimicrobial properties.
technical_approach: Special polymers, composites and nanotechnology applied to antimicrobial polyolefin pellets and functional material formulations.
industry_destination: packaging, surfaces, public health and industrial materials
thesis_scope_note: Include as advanced material with direct biointerface relevance, not as biotech or agtech.
evidence_excerpt: Argentina Agencia I+D+i describes Nairotech as a company specialized in special polymers and selected for antimicrobial polyolefin pellets that reduce virus, bacteria and fungi persistence on surfaces.

startup_summary_v1: AgriCapital is a Colombian agrifintech providing digital AgroCrédito for farmers, rural workers and agro-businesses through mobile workflows and a network of partner agro-stores. Its credit lets producers buy inputs, tools and machinery, pay according to harvest cycles and access financing in rural areas without heavy paperwork. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as agricultural finance infrastructure directly coupled to crop productivity and smallholder resilience.
business_one_liner: Smallholder agricultural financing platform.
problem_addressed: Smallholder farmers face slow, paper-heavy and poorly adapted credit for productive inputs, tools and crop-cycle needs.
technical_approach: Digital credit workflows, mobile app, partner agro-store network, risk/approval process and harvest-aligned repayment for agricultural purchases.
thesis_scope_note: Include as an edge but defensible ag-finance layer because it funds material biological production, not horizontal consumer finance.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says AgriCapital provides fast AgroCrédito for Colombian producers through mobile applications and partner agro-stores, with harvest-aligned payment and credit for inputs, tools and machinery.

startup_summary_v1: BemAgro is a Brazilian precision-agriculture SaaS company using AI, drone imagery, machinery vectors and cloud geospatial processing to support crop management from planting to harvest. Its modules process field images, detect weeds, simulate planting lines, generate variable-rate zones, restore crop rows, detect planting failures and count plants. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as field-intelligence infrastructure for productive and resource-efficient agriculture.
business_one_liner: AI and drone-imagery SaaS for high-resolution crop intelligence.
problem_addressed: Low-resolution field data and fragmented drone or machinery imagery make agronomic planning, monitoring and harvest optimization inefficient.
technical_approach: Cloud SaaS, AI, drone-image processing, machinery-vector processing, geospatial analytics, weed detection and variable-rate application maps.
thesis_scope_note: Include as precision-ag infrastructure directly coupled to crop productivity, input efficiency and field-level decisions.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes cloud SaaS modules for drone and machinery-vector processing, AI planning, weed detection, variable-rate zones, row restoration, planting-failure detection and plant counting.

startup_summary_v1: Blooms Capital is a trade-finance platform for Latin American fruit and vegetable exporters. It offers pre-export working capital, non-recourse cross-border factoring, global payments and FX tools through a data-driven process, including 24-hour invoice payment and U.S. virtual accounts for export collections. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as agri-food export finance infrastructure, an edge case directly linked to biological produce supply chains.
business_one_liner: Agricultural exporter finance platform.
problem_addressed: Agricultural exporters face liquidity gaps, slow invoice payment, cross-border payment friction and FX risk across fresh-produce trade cycles.
technical_approach: Data-driven financing process, pre-export working capital, non-recourse factoring, virtual U.S. accounts, global payments and FX tools.
thesis_scope_note: Include as edge agri-food capital infrastructure because it serves fruit and vegetable export chains rather than horizontal finance.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says Blooms provides pre-export finance, cross-border factoring, global payments, virtual U.S. accounts and FX tools for fruit and vegetable exporters, with fast data-driven financing.

startup_summary_v1: Brazilian agricultural production platform turning idle or underused land into standardized, traceable, technology-monitored high-value crops, starting with berries and expanding toward cacao and avocado. It combines financing, technical assistance, agronomic monitoring, guaranteed purchase and buyer-side traceability. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as material agri-food infrastructure for crop production, land-use intensification, producer income and transparent supply chains.
business_one_liner: Traceable high-value crop production platform.
problem_addressed: Idle land, fragmented crop operations and weak traceability for small and mid-sized producers.
technical_approach: Integrated agronomic monitoring, financing, technical assistance, guaranteed purchase and buyer traceability.
industry_destination: High-value crops and agri-food supply chains
thesis_scope_note: Core include: it reorganizes agricultural production and traceable biological supply chains, not generic farm software.
evidence_excerpt: CerradoX says it transforms idle land into berries through standardized, traceable and technology-monitored production, with financing, technical assistance, guaranteed purchase and real-time monitoring.

startup_summary_v1: Culttivo is a Brazilian coffee-finance and risk-intelligence platform that uses satellite imagery, analytics and ESG or climate-risk signals to improve credit access for coffee producers. It is not a biotech company, but it is directly attached to a material biological production system: coffee farming. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as agri-finance infrastructure for resilient crop production, producer transition and climate-risk underwriting.
business_one_liner: Climate-aware credit and risk platform for coffee producers.
problem_addressed: Coffee producers face inefficient, opaque credit access and weak climate or ESG risk evaluation.
technical_approach: Satellite imagery, analytics and producer-risk workflows for transparent agricultural credit.
thesis_scope_note: Include as financial infrastructure tightly coupled to crop production and resilience.
evidence_excerpt: The Yield Lab Latam describes Culttivo as a digital platform delivering efficient and transparent credit to coffee producers using satellite imagery and advanced analytics.

startup_summary_v1: IncluirTec is a Colombian agfintech-as-a-service platform enabling formal credit for small agricultural producers, rural microentrepreneurs and financial institutions. Its official site describes a digital bridge between producers and banks, microfinance institutions, NGOs and non-bank lenders, using alternative risk evaluation and 100% digital loan workflows. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as edge but defensible agricultural capital infrastructure tied to rural productive systems.
business_one_liner: Agfintech infrastructure for smallholder credit inclusion.
problem_addressed: Small agricultural producers face limited access to formal finance, high transaction costs and weak risk-assessment fit from traditional lenders.
technical_approach: SaaS agfintech workflows, alternative risk evaluation and digital loan origination for rural producers and financial institutions.
industry_destination: Smallholder agriculture, rural finance and productive inclusion
thesis_scope_note: Edge include: not biotech, but capital infrastructure directly coupled to agricultural production and smallholder resilience.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes IncluirTec as an agrofintech that transforms access to formal financing for small agricultural producers through digital workflows and alternative risk evaluation.

startup_summary_v1: Chilean animal-health biotechnology company developing tailored antibacterial solutions for poultry and livestock producers. Its platform combines AI-optimized sampling, bacterial diagnostics, virulence and antibiotic-resistance analysis, and machine-learning selection of bacteriophage combinations that target farm-specific pathogens. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a core phage-biotech and One Health company reducing antibiotic dependence in animal protein systems.
business_one_liner: AI-guided bacteriophage animal-health platform.
problem_addressed: Antibiotic dependence and farm-specific bacterial outbreaks in poultry and livestock production.
technical_approach: AI-optimized sampling, bacterial diagnostics, phage repositories and machine-learning selection of bacteriophage combinations.
industry_destination: Poultry, livestock, animal health and One Health
thesis_scope_note: Core include: bacteriophage biotechnology for animal health and antimicrobial-resistance reduction.
evidence_excerpt: PhageLab says it develops sustainable tailor-made solutions to control bacterial outbreaks using bacteriophages, AI-based sampling, bacterial analysis and optimal phage combinations on farms.

startup_summary_v1: Plataforma brasilena de transparencia, trazabilidad y cumplimiento socioambiental para cadenas agroindustriales. Entra por infraestructura material de gobernanza y verificacion sobre produccion agropecuaria real.
business_one_liner: Agribusiness transparency and compliance platform.
problem_addressed: Opacidad y falta de verificacion socioambiental en cadenas agroindustriales.
technical_approach: Trazabilidad, verificacion y conexion entre empresas y productores comprometidos con estandares sociales y ambientales.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por acople directo a gobernanza de cadenas materiales agropecuarias.
evidence_excerpt: The Yield Lab Latam portfolio positions Produzindo Certo around transparency and high social and environmental standards in agribusiness chains.

startup_summary_v1: Startup agtech colombiana que combina hardware y software adaptados para trazabilidad en tiempo real y productividad por planta en cultivos tropicales como banana y palma. Entra claramente por precision agriculture intelligence.
business_one_liner: Tropical crop traceability and operational intelligence platform.
problem_addressed: Baja visibilidad operacional y decisiones basadas en estimaciones en cultivos tropicales.
technical_approach: Ecosistema tecnologico con hardware y software adaptado para trazabilidad, eficiencia operativa y analitica por planta.
thesis_scope_note: Entra claramente por trazabilidad y control del ciclo productivo en sistemas materiales vivos.
evidence_excerpt: The Yield Lab Latam describes Sioma as a Colombian agtech delivering real-time traceability and per-plant operational intelligence for tropical crops.

startup_summary_v1: Agtech peruana para cultivos de alto valor que integra imagenes satelitales, drones y workflows de campo para brindar insights agronomicos durante toda la temporada. Entra claramente por precision agriculture intelligence.
business_one_liner: High-value crop agronomic workflow platform.
problem_addressed: Baja visibilidad agronomica y laboral en cultivos de alto valor a lo largo de la temporada.
technical_approach: Analitica de remote sensing y app movil flexible para capturar eventos agronomicos y organizar workflows de campo.
thesis_scope_note: Entra claramente por monitoreo y gestion material del cultivo.
evidence_excerpt: The Yield Lab Latam describes SpaceAG as a digital platform for high-value crops using satellite and drone imagery plus mobile agronomic workflows.

startup_summary_v1: Verqor is a Mexican agfintech providing formal, digital and productive financing for farmers and agricultural SMEs, especially for inputs, machinery and working capital. Its official site describes credit adapted to crop cycles, digital onboarding, input purchases and producer/supplier workflows; public impact material adds regenerative-practice adoption and access to biological agro-inputs. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as edge agricultural capital infrastructure.
business_one_liner: Digital agricultural finance and input-credit platform.
problem_addressed: Farmers and agricultural SMEs face fragmented credit access, input-financing gaps and weak financing products adapted to crop cycles.
technical_approach: Digital agricultural credit, input financing, supplier workflows, farmer onboarding and crop-cycle repayment structures.
industry_destination: Agriculture, rural finance and agro-input supply chains
thesis_scope_note: Edge include: financial infrastructure, but tightly coupled to agricultural production, input access and regenerative-practice adoption.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Verqor as digital financing for agricultural inputs and crop production, with impact on thousands of farmers and regenerative practices.

startup_summary_v1: Voa is a Brazilian precision-agriculture company operating drone fleets and analytics services for field monitoring and precise application of biological agents, agrochemicals and nutrients. Its value is operational rather than molecular: it helps farms deploy inputs more accurately and manage crops at scale. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as precision application infrastructure for biological agents, crop nutrition and lower-impact agricultural production.
business_one_liner: Drone-enabled crop monitoring and biological-input application.
problem_addressed: Inefficient monitoring and imprecise field application of biological agents, agrochemicals and nutrients.
technical_approach: Drone fleets, field analytics and precision application services for crop protection, biological agents and nutrition.
industry_destination: Crop protection, biological-input application and farm operations
thesis_scope_note: Include as precision-ag infrastructure for biological-agent deployment; not an ag-biologicals producer itself.
evidence_excerpt: The Yield Lab Latam describes VOA as a drone fleet and analytics service for precise monitoring and application of biological agents, agrochemicals and nutrients.

startup_summary_v1: Biotech chileno-estadounidense que desarrolla terapias para restaurar el balance proteico del cerebro durante envejecimiento y neurodegeneracion. Entra claramente por therapeutics y biologia aplicada.
business_one_liner: Neurodegeneration proteostasis therapeutics platform.
problem_addressed: Declive neuronal y falta de terapias que reviertan el desbalance proteico en envejecimiento y neurodegeneracion.
technical_approach: Plataforma de proteomica, modelos biologicos y drug discovery para identificar moleculas capaces de revertir el deterioro neuronal.
thesis_scope_note: Entra claramente por therapeutics y medicina regenerativa/neurodegenerativa.
evidence_excerpt: Zentynel describes Momentum Therapeutics as developing therapies aimed at restoring the brain protein balance during aging and neurodegeneration.

startup_summary_v1: Startup chile/usa de crop biotech que desarrolla nuevas variedades mediante edicion genetica de precision y breeding acelerado. Entra claramente por ag biologicals and crop resilience.
business_one_liner: Precision gene editing crop platform.
problem_addressed: Lentitud en desarrollar semillas mas productivas, nutritivas y resilientes al clima.
technical_approach: Edicion genetica de precision y ciclos de mejoramiento acelerados para crear semillas de nueva generacion.
thesis_scope_note: Entra claramente por biotech aplicada a semillas y resiliencia agricola.
evidence_excerpt: Zentynel describes Neocrop Technologies as developing crop varieties with precision gene editing and accelerated breeding for resilient and productive seeds.

startup_summary_v1: HeXemBio is a regenerative-medicine biotechnology company developing blood stem-cell rejuvenation therapies. Its lead program targets improved bone-marrow transplant outcomes in blood-cancer patients by restoring aged or exhausted hematopoietic stem cells before reinfusion; the company reports FDA Orphan Drug Designation and a completed Pre-IND meeting. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as core regenerative therapeutics, stem-cell biology and cell-therapy infrastructure.
business_one_liner: Hematopoietic stem-cell rejuvenation therapy platform.
problem_addressed: Bone marrow transplant failure, immune decline and aging-related loss of hematopoietic stem-cell function limit patient outcomes.
technical_approach: Stem-cell rejuvenation, synthetic developmental niche / yolk-sac biology, ex vivo HSC restoration and translational regenerative-medicine workflows.
thesis_scope_note: Include as core regenerative therapeutics and advanced cell-therapy platform.
evidence_excerpt: Official HexemBio article describes a blood stem-cell rejuvenation platform targeting bone marrow transplant outcomes, FDA Orphan Drug Designation and a planned IND pathway for human trials.

startup_summary_v1: Asclepii is a regenerative-medicine company developing wound-care technologies between basic bandages and complex cell therapies. Its Artemis tissue-regeneration matrix and Poseidon nanosilver hydrogel wound dressing are clinical wound-healing products for tissue repair, infection control and modern wound management. It is not a food-ingredient or cosmetic case; it should cluster with regenerative medicine, wound care, tissue repair and clinical biomaterials.
business_one_liner: Regenerative wound-care matrix and nanosilver hydrogel platform.
problem_addressed: Chronic and complex wounds need scalable tissue-repair technologies beyond simple dressings and before expensive cell therapies.
technical_approach: Tissue-regeneration matrices and nanosilver hydrogel wound dressings for clinical wound care.
industry_destination: wound care, tissue repair, hospitals and clinical medicine
thesis_scope_note: Include as regenerative medicine / clinical biomaterials, not food or cosmetics.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Poseidon as an FDA-cleared nanosilver hydrogel wound dressing and positions Asclepii around regenerative medicine for modern wound care; legacy site describes Artemis as a scalable tissue-regeneration matrix.

startup_summary_v1: Biotech uruguaya que desarrolla inmunoterapias y vacunas terapeuticas para inflamacion cronica en mascotas. Entra claramente por animal health therapeutics.
business_one_liner: Pet immunotherapy and therapeutic vaccine platform.
problem_addressed: Falta de terapias novedosas para inflamacion cronica y mejor healthspan en mascotas.
technical_approach: Inmunoterapias y vacunas terapeuticas first-in-class para condiciones inflamatorias en animales de compania.
thesis_scope_note: Entra claramente por veterinaria biotech y One Health.
evidence_excerpt: Zentynel describes Xeptiva Therapeutics as developing immunotherapies and therapeutic vaccines for chronic inflammation in pets.

startup_summary_v1: Startup con base regional en argentina/mexico/brasil que convierte datos genomicos en decisiones terapeuticas y tratamientos personalizados. Entra por genomic diagnostics and precision health.
business_one_liner: Genomic precision-treatment platform.
problem_addressed: Tratamientos poco personalizados y baja traduccion de datos genomicos a decisiones clinicas en LatAm.
technical_approach: Testing genomico y plataformas de decision terapeutica junto a alianzas para acceso a drogas complejas.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por genomic diagnostics / precision medicine.
evidence_excerpt: Zentynel describes Biomakers as transforming genomic data into therapeutic decisions through genomic testing and personalized-treatment workflows.

startup_summary_v1: Brazil/US infant-nutrition biotech developing human breastmilk-like formula ingredients through precision fermentation. The company aims to replace cow-milk-based infant formulas with bioidentical human-milk components produced by microbes, improving nutrition while reducing dependence on animal dairy inputs. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as a food-biotech and precision-fermentation company in alternative proteins and next-generation infant nutrition.
business_one_liner: Precision-fermented infant nutrition platform.
problem_addressed: Dependence on cow-milk-based infant formulas and limited sustainable alternatives for infant nutrition.
technical_approach: Precision fermentation and nutritional bioengineering to produce human-milk-like formula components.
industry_destination: Infant nutrition, alternative dairy and food biotech
thesis_scope_note: Core include: precision fermentation for animal-free nutrition and food-system transition.
evidence_excerpt: BRINC describes Harmony Baby Nutrition as using precision fermentation with microbes to replicate components found in natural breast milk for infant formula.

startup_summary_v1: Startup colombo-estadounidense que desarrolla soluciones impulsadas por AI para diagnostico y manejo de enfermedades respiratorias. Entra por diagnostics and medtech.
business_one_liner: AI respiratory diagnosis and monitoring platform.
problem_addressed: Diagnostico tardio o inaccesible de enfermedades respiratorias y baja continuidad en su manejo.
technical_approach: Plataforma con AI para diagnostico y monitoreo respiratorio.
thesis_scope_note: Entra claramente por diagnostico clinico/medtech.
evidence_excerpt: Zentynel describes Samay as building AI-powered solutions for respiratory disease diagnosis and management.

startup_summary_v1: Autem Medical / Autem Therapeutics is an oncology medtech company developing AutEMsys, a non-invasive therapy that delivers low-level, amplitude-modulated electromagnetic frequencies to patients in two- or four-week intervals. The company frames the therapy as balancing cancer-cell electrophysiology and improving standard oncology treatment, with accessible infrastructure and no cold-chain requirement. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as therapeutic medtech, not molecular biotech.
business_one_liner: Non-invasive electromagnetic oncology treatment platform.
problem_addressed: Advanced cancer patients often have limited treatment options, high adverse-effect burden and expensive infrastructure requirements.
technical_approach: Low-level amplitude-modulated electromagnetic frequency therapy delivered through AutEMsys as a non-invasive adjunct oncology treatment.
thesis_scope_note: Include as therapeutic medtech; mechanism is biophysical rather than bio-based, so it remains less core than cell or molecular therapeutics.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes AutEMsys as a patent-protected therapy delivering low-level amplitude-modulated electromagnetic frequencies to balance cellular electrophysiology and support accessible cancer care.

startup_summary_v1: MultiplAI Health is an Argentina/UK preventive-medicine biotech using whole-blood RNA sequencing and AI to screen cardiovascular and other complex diseases remotely. The company positions its platform as a low-cost, blood-based transcriptomic test combined with machine learning for earlier risk detection and scalable preventive care. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as genomic diagnostics and precision-health infrastructure.
business_one_liner: RNA sequencing and AI screening for cardiovascular disease.
problem_addressed: Cardiovascular and complex diseases are often detected late, while conventional biomarkers can miss molecular risk signals.
technical_approach: Whole-blood RNA sequencing, transcriptomic biomarker modeling, machine learning and remote preventive-medicine workflows.
industry_destination: Preventive medicine, cardiovascular diagnostics and complex-disease screening
thesis_scope_note: Include as precision diagnostics: AI is enabling, but the core signal is molecular/genomic health data.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes whole-blood RNA sequencing plus AI screening for cardiovascular and other complex diseases.

startup_summary_v1: Startup brasileña de bioeconomia que desarrolla moleculas bioactivas unicas extraidas de la Amazonia para productos de healthspan y longevidad. Entra claramente por biomoleculas, biodiversidad y bioeconomia regenerativa.
business_one_liner: Amazonian bioactive compounds platform.
problem_addressed: Subaprovechamiento de compuestos bioactivos de la biodiversidad amazónica y baja captura de valor local.
technical_approach: Desarrollo de ingredientes y compuestos bioactivos a partir de biodiversidad amazónica con modelo de impacto regenerativo.
thesis_scope_note: Entra claramente por biomateriales/ingredientes bioactivos y regeneracion de bioeconomia amazónica.
evidence_excerpt: KPTL describes AGES as creating healthspan products with bioactive molecules extracted from the Amazon and generating a regenerative local bioeconomy.

startup_summary_v1: Biotech brasileña pionera en terapia con células madre para mascotas, enfocada en regenerar tejidos y tratar enfermedades degenerativas. Entra claramente por animal health biotech.
business_one_liner: Veterinary stem-cell therapy platform.
problem_addressed: Pocas opciones avanzadas para enfermedades crónicas y degenerativas en mascotas.
technical_approach: Terapias celulares con células madre para medicina veterinaria regenerativa.
thesis_scope_note: Entra claramente por cell therapy aplicada a salud animal.
evidence_excerpt: KPTL describes OMICS as pioneering stem-cell therapy for pets to regenerate tissues and treat chronic degenerative diseases.

startup_summary_v1: AGROTOOLS is a Brazilian agribusiness intelligence platform connecting land, supply chains and corporate decision-making through geospatial data, risk analytics and ESG/compliance monitoring. Its solutions support rural finance, insurance, sourcing, brand protection, supply-chain intelligence and socioenvironmental monitoring, with more than 1,300 data layers and large-scale territorial analyses. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as agri-risk, traceability and planetary-boundary intelligence infrastructure for agricultural value chains.
business_one_liner: Agricultural risk, supply-chain and ESG intelligence platform.
problem_addressed: Agribusiness companies lack real-time visibility into land origin, producer risk, compliance, sourcing, insurance and socioenvironmental exposure.
technical_approach: Geospatial analytics, agribusiness databases, risk algorithms, ESG compliance workflows, supply-chain intelligence and territorial monitoring.
industry_destination: Agriculture, banking, insurance and commodity chains
thesis_scope_note: Include as biocentric ag-data infrastructure: not biotech, but directly governs agricultural land, supply-chain risk and environmental compliance.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says Agrotools connects land to business decision-making, offers real-time visibility across agribusiness chains, supports rural finance, insurance, ESG compliance and supply-chain intelligence, and uses more than 1,300 data layers.

startup_summary_v1: Agtech brasileña que usa IA y analitica agronomica para mejorar manejo agricola, aumentar productividad y reducir desperdicio. Entra por precision agriculture intelligence.
business_one_liner: AI agronomic forecasting platform.
problem_addressed: Baja precision en manejo de cultivos y menor capacidad predictiva en decisiones agronomicas.
technical_approach: IA y modelos agronomicos para generar predicciones confiables y optimizar manejo productivo.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por inteligencia agronomica directamente acoplada a rendimiento y desperdicio.
evidence_excerpt: KPTL describes SmartBreeder as using AI and agronomic analytics to increase yields and reduce waste.

startup_summary_v1: TBIT is a Brazilian agtech replacing manual seed and grain analysis with digital image processing and AI. The technology supports objective quality evaluation for seed companies, grain handlers and agricultural supply chains. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as crop-input and grain-quality intelligence: software and vision models applied to biological agricultural materials.
business_one_liner: AI seed and grain analysis platform.
problem_addressed: Manual seed and grain analysis is slow, subjective and difficult to standardize.
technical_approach: Image processing and AI models for digital seed and grain quality analysis.
industry_destination: seeds, grains and agricultural supply chains
thesis_scope_note: Include as precision agriculture intelligence applied directly to biological crop materials.
evidence_excerpt: KPTL describes TBIT as replacing manual seed and grain analysis with accurate digital analysis based on image processing and AI.

startup_summary_v1: Chilean vertical-farming company producing fresh leafy vegetables locally in controlled indoor hydroponic environments. Its Carmelo OS operating system manages climate and nutrition to grow pesticide-free produce year-round, close to demand, with 95 percent less water and 99 percent less soil than traditional cultivation. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as resource-efficient food production and urban biological supply-chain infrastructure.
business_one_liner: Controlled-environment vertical farming for fresh produce.
problem_addressed: Water-intensive horticulture, land use, pesticides, food loss and long-distance fresh-produce supply chains.
technical_approach: Indoor hydroponics, controlled climate, Carmelo OS, local production and origin traceability.
industry_destination: Fresh produce, controlled-environment agriculture and food retail
thesis_scope_note: Core include: biological food production with radical water and land efficiency.
evidence_excerpt: AgroUrbana says its indoor hydroponic vertical farming grows local vegetables year-round, pesticide-free, with 95 percent less water and 99 percent less soil than traditional cultivation.

startup_summary_v1: Startup chilena que toma compuestos funcionales de origen natural y usa nanotecnologia para formular nutraceuticos con mayor estabilidad y absorcion. Entra por food biotech / functional ingredients.
business_one_liner: Nanoencapsulated functional food ingredients platform.
problem_addressed: Baja biodisponibilidad y fragilidad de compuestos funcionales naturales en formulaciones alimentarias.
technical_approach: Nanoencapsulacion y formulacion de ingredientes funcionales, empezando por curcumina altamente pura para productos nutraceuticos.
thesis_scope_note: Entra por ingredientes funcionales de origen natural y tecnologia aplicada a alimentos/nutraceuticos.
evidence_excerpt: ChileGlobal Ventures describes Matchetune as using nature-derived compounds and nanotechnology to offer functional products, including a nanoencapsulated curcumin-based superfood shot.

startup_summary_v1: Gênica is a Brazilian ag-biologicals company developing bioinputs and soil-health technologies for regenerative crop management. Its R&D spans bioprospection of new organisms and microbial groups, molecular techniques, bioinformatics and products based on organic molecules from microorganisms or other sources. The company emphasizes biological products that reduce chemical pesticide and nitrogen-fertilizer dependence, protect soil and groundwater, and regenerate productive systems. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as core agricultural biologicals.
business_one_liner: Soil health and agricultural biologicals platform.
problem_addressed: Soil degradation and dependence on synthetic fertilizers and chemical pesticides reduce resilience, water quality and long-term productivity.
technical_approach: Bioprospection, microbial groups, molecular techniques, bioinformatics, biological agents, organic molecules and quality-controlled bioinput production.
industry_destination: Crop production, soil health and regenerative agriculture
thesis_scope_note: Include as core ag biologicals and regenerative soil-health technology.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes bioinputs, bioprospection, molecular techniques and bioinformatics; its ESG page says bioinputs reduce chemical pesticides and fossil nitrogen fertilizers, preserve soil and groundwater, and support biological regeneration.

startup_summary_v1: Agrosmart is a Brazilian climate-smart agriculture platform providing climate, agronomic, irrigation and ESG intelligence for producers and agrifood corporations. Its products include BoosterAGRO for farm climate/agronomic collaboration, BoosterPRO for climate monitoring and irrigation management, and an ESG platform for risk, sustainability and compliance reporting. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as precision-ag and climate-adaptation infrastructure for more resilient, efficient and transparent food production systems.
business_one_liner: Climate-smart agronomic and irrigation intelligence platform.
problem_addressed: Farmers and agrifood chains face climate risk, inefficient water use, weak field visibility and limited sustainability/compliance reporting.
technical_approach: Climate data, agronomic intelligence, irrigation monitoring, producer apps, risk analytics and ESG reporting workflows.
industry_destination: Crop production, irrigation, agrifood chains and sustainability teams
thesis_scope_note: Include as biocentric precision-ag and climate-resilience infrastructure directly tied to agricultural production systems.
evidence_excerpt: Official site describes Agrosmart as accelerating the transition to productive, sustainable and climate-resilient agriculture by integrating agronomic, environmental and financial intelligence and services.

startup_summary_v1: Startup brasileña de agricultura vertical urbana para producir hojas frescas cerca del consumo con menor uso de recursos. Entra claramente por food systems biobasados.
business_one_liner: Vertical urban farming platform.
problem_addressed: Produccion fresca urbana intensiva en tierra, logistica y desperdicio.
technical_approach: Granjas verticales en ambiente controlado para abastecimiento local de hortalizas.
thesis_scope_note: Entra claramente por controlled-environment agriculture y eficiencia material en alimentos.
evidence_excerpt: SP Ventures portfolio lists Pink Farms in its climate-smart agriculture portfolio.

startup_summary_v1: Agtech brasileña para gestion de rodeos y digitalizacion de la cadena de ganaderia vacuna. Entra por precision agriculture intelligence aplicada a sistemas vivos de produccion animal.
business_one_liner: Beef cattle management intelligence platform.
problem_addressed: Baja eficiencia y trazabilidad en manejo de ganado bovino.
technical_approach: Software y herramientas digitales para gestion de rodeo, trazabilidad y decisiones productivas.
thesis_scope_note: Entra como inteligencia operacional sobre sistema material de proteina animal.
evidence_excerpt: SP Ventures founder quote says JetBov makes the beef cattle chain more efficient and sustainable through digital technologies.

startup_summary_v1: Brazilian animal-reproduction biotechnology company developing a protein-based technology intended to increase pregnancy rates in mammals. The available source is still a fund portfolio signal rather than a detailed company website, but the mechanism and market are clearly biological: fertility, livestock reproduction and animal productivity. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as animal biotech for reproductive efficiency in living production systems.
business_one_liner: Protein-based animal reproduction biotech.
problem_addressed: Low pregnancy rates and reproductive inefficiency in livestock systems.
technical_approach: Biotechnology development of proteins applied to mammalian reproduction and livestock productivity.
industry_destination: Animal reproduction, fertility and livestock productivity
thesis_scope_note: Include, but keep source quality medium until an official company/product source is found.
evidence_excerpt: SP Ventures legacy portfolio describes development of a protein that increases the pregnancy rate in mammals in an unprecedented way.

startup_summary_v1: Agrolend is a Brazilian agfintech focused on agricultural credit, receivables trading, data-driven risk analysis and monitoring for producers, investors and agribusiness. It is not nature restoration; it belongs only as a thesis-border case because it finances biological production systems. It should cluster with agri-finance, producer infrastructure and agricultural risk intelligence.
business_one_liner: Agricultural credit, receivables and risk-monitoring platform.
problem_addressed: Agricultural producers face inefficient credit access and investors need better agricultural-risk monitoring.
technical_approach: Digital agricultural credit, data-driven risk analysis, monitoring and receivables trading infrastructure.
industry_destination: farmers, agribusiness credit, investors and rural finance
thesis_scope_note: Include as border ag-finance infrastructure coupled to biological production systems.
evidence_excerpt: SP Ventures says Agrolend reinvents agricultural credit through connections and data, integrating analysis, risk monitoring and digital trading of agricultural receivables.

startup_summary_v1: Startup chilena de biomateriales y tintas sostenibles derivadas de bacterias no patogenas y residuos agricolas. Entra claramente por biomateriales, quimica biobasada y sustitucion de insumos toxicos.
business_one_liner: Bacteria-derived sustainable inks and textile biomaterials.
problem_addressed: Uso extendido de tintas y materiales textiles con componentes toxicos y alta carga ambiental.
technical_approach: Pigmentos bacterianos, biomateriales y aprovechamiento de residuos para tintas y materiales textiles de menor impacto.
thesis_scope_note: Entra claramente por materiales biobasados y sustitucion de quimica toxica.
evidence_excerpt: The Ganesha Lab says Patagon Fiber develops zero-emission inks derived from non-pathogenic bacteria as an eco-friendly alternative to harmful traditional inks.

startup_summary_v1: Amplify Dynamics is a Colombian/US bioprocessing tools company developing contactless ultrafiltration for lipid nanoparticle therapeutics. Its platform combines microfluidic flows and electronically controlled ultrasonic waves to separate LNPs without physical membranes, aiming to increase particle recovery, reduce purification time, improve throughput and cut waste. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as enabling infrastructure for gene therapy, vaccines, nanomedicine and biomanufacturing.
business_one_liner: Contactless ultrasound purification for lipid nanoparticles.
problem_addressed: Lipid nanoparticle purification causes sample loss, low throughput, inefficient workflows and waste in therapeutic development.
technical_approach: Microfluidic flows, electronic ultrasonic-wave control, contactless filtration and automated high-throughput LNP separation.
industry_destination: Pharmaceutical bioprocessing, gene therapy and nanotherapeutics
thesis_scope_note: Include as core bioprocessing tools for advanced therapeutics and LNP manufacturing.
evidence_excerpt: Official site says Amplify Dynamics develops membrane-free ultrasound ultrafiltration for LNP therapeutics, increasing recovery, reducing purification time and decreasing waste generation.

startup_summary_v1: Colombian biotechnology company developing bacteriophage-based bioproducts to control bacterial pathogens in animal health, especially poultry and aquaculture. Its SalmoFree and related phage products target Salmonella and other bacterial problems, helping reduce antibiotic use and improve production efficiency. It belongs inside BIO VC LATAM as phage-based animal-health biotech, food-safety infrastructure and antimicrobial-resistance mitigation for livestock systems.
business_one_liner: Bacteriophage bioproducts for animal health and food safety.
problem_addressed: Antibiotic dependence and bacterial pathogens in poultry, aquaculture and animal production.
technical_approach: Natural bacteriophage products for Salmonella and other bacterial-control applications.
industry_destination: Animal health, poultry, aquaculture and food safety
thesis_scope_note: Core include: bacteriophage biotechnology for animal health, food safety and AMR reduction.

startup_summary_v1: The Earth Says is a Chilean agtech using AI-based monitoring of hives and pollination conditions to improve crop yields and optimize pollination services. startup_summary_v1: Delee is a Mexican oncology diagnostics company developing CytoCatch, an automated platform for isolating and analyzing circulating tumor cells from blood.
